subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, September 2, 2023
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=njtftryww&r=umwffggwgqwc&s=zzbfslggscbccqgbbtrdcvswlvvcmltqvmb&q=1693656000&a=view)
---
| [](http://click1.srnemail.com/tcvpvcddvtbkttrdkbbglkjtsvkmcsstzcgrszbhhbvmhw_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
---
---
---
| |
###
---
| | [ Swamp Kings...of Disappointment ](http://click1.srnemail.com/dmrjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhhrcdht_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
### _Friday, September 1, 2023_
As some of you already know, "Friday's Finest" is the show where we get a little unconventional. What's more unconventional than having someone else host the show. Chip Lake takes the reins as we navigate through the beginning of the football season. We discuss the disappointing documentary about the Tim Tebow Florida Gators. What makes you a world Champion? Track star Noah Lyles has a hot take that had the sports world up in arms. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/wsvjgsttghwbhhmtbwwydbzhkgbnskkhlsymklwvvwgnvl_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
---|---
| [ You don’t even know why you think that way (Encore) ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vgvyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkppkhjpp_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
### _Wednesday, August 30, 2023_
I have always been fascinated by the way people think and the things people depend on for making decisions. Today I talk about what goes into our decision making and why we need to be cautious and careful as we make our life decisions. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/fndyjnccjpbwpplcwbbfdwrptjwgnttpsnfltsbhhbjghb_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
| [ Heroes and Dreams ](http://click1.srnemail.com/plfvmlrrmgybggkrbyyshbdgwmbclwwgqlskwqyjjymcjm_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
### _Monday, August 28, 2023_
Today we bring you another installment of "I Learned That". When you're a kid, the world is filled with endless possibilities, as a parent it's important to let your children dream big. What are the true qualities of a hero? The world keeps turning even when you don't want it too. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ebqqbhvvbctfccwvfttkrfpcjbfzhjjcshkwjstyytbzyh_rrrvvkknkrnlpcvlnvgvjjj.html)
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zue8q2ls3esvo37jolnb7qfh4nqg2jpj2lg6ok3g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim4ob6c9h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7e5msmh0bmsee36j23maojo8drk81f9i97tqke8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim4ob6c9h2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1s4obqsblv1sf4jh1vucllq6mrfs7oe83pd99k0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim4ob6c9h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1h1uke5jq8qca04vb55v4383fen1jp2macghuvg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim4ob6c9h2bs)
---

1600 Daily
---

This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7u9720pbsha77uuuse3rfl800qi69vv815ot0l8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim4ob1c5h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: TRIAL DAY BEFORE SUPER TUESDAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
ELECTION INTERFERENCE.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8efcs6m3eqrfhdfjqf6i2vkjub1opp99ta57qq8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim2oj4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
Biden’s weaponized Department of Justice is interfering in the Republican primary to try and stop me from becoming our party’s presidential nominee.
**The Obama-appointed judge has scheduled a TRIAL DATE in the Biden DOJ’s witch hunt against me on the DAY BEFORE SUPER TUESDAY – when I am expected to be declared the PRESUMPTIVE GOP nominee for President. **
This is the same judge who has publicly expressed ANGER that I continue to walk as a free man in America...
The Left just forced me to take a mugshot in an attempt to turn me into Public Enemy #1.
After I used their mugshot against them to raise over $9 MILLION for our America First movement, they are now retaliating with a vengeance.
_Their new attack is to force me to stand trial on the day before the Republican primary is set to be wrapped up and it’s officially time to begin the General Election against Joe Biden._
But I want to make one thing clear: I am not the _r eal_ victim in this vicious act of Election Interference.
...This is an attack on **YOU** – the voter.
**The Biden Administration is interfering in the Republican primary to try and effectively disenfranchise millions of voters and rob you of your vote.**
They don’t want a political outsider in the White House. And they certainly don’t want to have to face me in a General Election where they are _guaranteed_ to lose in a free and fair fight.
**But no matter how many times they arrest me, indict me, take my mugshot, intimidate me, or force me to stand trial as an innocent man, I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again.**
And I know that I have millions of supporters like you who will also NEVER SURRENDER our mission to save our country.
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv3le0kcpsriluq5djnkfhtqvck8d68g73ul481g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim2oj4c5h2bs)
---
On November 5, 2024, we will win back the White House and prove that America’s elections are still decided by the American people.
_If you’re doing poorly right now due to the corrupt politicians who would rather try to IMPRISON me as an innocent man than actually fix our broken country, then ignore my request..._
**[Otherwise, please make a contribution of any amount to peacefully defend our movement as the Deep State tries to JAIL me for life as an innocent man.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg6ks1fvf8ebthbfdspthu2t64hd3lkes9hffs40_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim2oj4c5h2bs)**

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nj3x75U%2fgfhu7NPOZKPn4g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22077%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C6UXP22wq8RRgLbLh1WAOg&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22078%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s5Zge5KI5zoUs177YBotqw&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22079%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IFZvIhks5VrhGNrotH2L%2fQ&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22070%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WfYiz8%2b6PX%2f6jKG78Rw6fA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---

What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This top Republican suffered a medical emergency on live television
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 02, 2023

This top Republican
suffered a medical emergency on live television
Working in politics can be a
stressful job. But the stress might have proven too much for this
politician.

And this top Republican suffered
a medical emergency on live television.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Chilling testimony sent the
White House into complete chaos

The clock is ticking
on Joe Biden's presidency. But now his time may be up.
➞ Continue Reading

Chuck Schumer is shaking in
fear from this grave threat

Politics can be a
dangerous game. And Schumer's learning that firsthand.
➞ Continue Reading

This one lie may have ended
Joe Biden's career

President Biden can't
stay away from controversy no matter how hard he tries. But this
may have put the nail in his coffin.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: American Action News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbm3meqd6teeb210sqp9q0ekrjn0d8c24p24cmuo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkhknvo2iia8eojauhutvd46eu62iuahicl00ie0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5lln6gl5dh5k2oihmuav3aifjkrdq47l6bjcmg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk08542lkobi26k5ackg6obdcomdvthvve9iqq0g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h2bs)
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq6llkhaf30hqjj0e932nmkvpv2jfjq4p7hpqjag_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cdg6apb6c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb7hv617alud5chpssmok040gop9qmg7jffvovo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpfi3o9vrkm15623dt7d2jqa8uul79itepu7efp0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or4c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am not afraid to say these truths.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would me
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3ovsocprphf35o8qdv0jlnt7sj5rdu3nma3bolg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srjm5ie2p1i6tjb6pdj6iqm4ddkcpqrapb0slp6cdjlmloe4tj66mrrapj0m6rjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35cljcdg74cb6e4ob6p1nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9pj3clie6oj5c8iv0)

|
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z24mlmdl3qe6n3liadogqlpidrnudc8808qo4cr0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)
Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh3uonps8odtbbg4sik4c5ee7dl5g6ch56ff1u88_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zck5mq259iq00oac3dop39c9n79midnjq5d6fnrg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjkpqecn4hobhaqg0nh7c6rvgksdg8iom272fv9g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgeu7f7ftsleqesn1n29egik8a3gote7fu02pg8o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6b4pdhvne3tb01am8h4lbenqkb00m56522ckbi0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0odf3doqsobi1n86dpqivkv467l2qa3171rvlno_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)

---

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z272keti2rrlu6q4grup0600pkfc0ufaug7ep730_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4pac3v35jggtogtt9k80kptasmap1t6ddmhn0co_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvj206dvo0r2idtro5kc1oqfgipn1u3u83enr1lo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z677enb2sd7m8hkjhmbei64aufemp1jsgg8e9eg8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6baj5261jncdd4g8rn8mqsn8h2q8rr2b1bmqq4o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjhte4f1d59clhjqnou4meialob0gi5tg3c3hhd0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhk3qiv93bdmk6nvr7uqthgb264e82kq1gpkkdk8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2clh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7b12fahd78fhd92u28u1cm2ldhc86effca7k4hg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrd1gamct7tne8g1lp2ba14r3jer0t1rl1b6uquo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfp079eq2uothlmt7j3l3t8i1lioks6hu9fdddm8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpuktkeket9nrjaiq14epooro5bvpasttt4o38to_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu0kb350ljv9h805mtautnakrchersplhv5d2cqo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrivudgisv16h93k2o42gqo6qki102is6fkuijpo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbq93m1ojcvtu0fsu506paq05q9hsbkhsffpktf0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "The plan to end Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away!")
---

1 click. The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I ask for is your written endorsement. **[Will you make just 1 click?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9gptj75el2ap5aedn4qpec16spig33uphrrvrc0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "Will you make just 1 click?")**
| [ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zks6g8i00knkan1g4l722cudcfm2oldj3ordj55o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE")
---

---

This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support.**

_According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month._

**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0oebbqs3494o2icvar07ad3hvb6a8gl85n9br08_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "I’m humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates’ ads can remain up on the airwaves:")**

---

Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - **but if we miss our critical fundraising goal, we are going to FAIL.**

I'm only sending this **HAIL MARY** to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down.

**[This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone._It's game over without you._](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9u2suum2v17g8h4gtifbgl3e4p52i9ago6q9k58_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdim9or2cjh2bs "This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone. | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a526b7e1aec84c37a055f807a2ddcea9&_e=G-bZpJdjgjGJJcFYmxFkEi-6klhzxXsdgkjNc8hwy2fBuh71rs8LyPnbd1TVXLA3jlJnMxxzH3HoD7vugKg5Bx7fa7gXtTvdpudHGPwxa66WtgwlUYeLk_w4gBfouZ4xmAlo-v5HxiB3GTIZCdTCQVrCx81uirGJK4th5M2QZOV_P-w2JeXcCffj9QBboaNmswYtZk3sUKTZVWxlzNYN5UHXYysJKinUDMDwoMiUbbalM2NkZnTQ9m8qd3ohEhAG_9lmBQtc8UibgTrTBxtaYMw5YiNXjC6WTAh3S9aRE9-S7KsVkPtlMYw99HJF6Zz0WgLA1aP6qic9PK6XC2BLK5G8UrES5nVYnZjY0PYi41LHhXd_1gwjo2XisJz18NqjvkDDUHmWZY74NQLsCJhioQ%3D%3D)

Friend,
Biden's weaponized Department of Justice is interfering in the Republican primary to try and stop me from becoming our party's presidential nominee.
**The Obama-appointed judge has scheduled a TRIAL DATE in the Biden DOJ's witch hunt against me on the DAY BEFORE SUPER TUESDAY - when I am expected to be declared the PRESUMPTIVE GOP nominee for President. **
This is the same judge who has publicly expressed ANGER that I continue to walk as a free man in America...
The Left just forced me to take a mugshot in an attempt to turn me into Public Enemy #1.
After I used their mugshot against them to raise over $9 MILLION for our America First movement, they are now retaliating with a vengeance.
_Their new attack is to force me to stand trial on the day before the Republican primary is set to be wrapped up and it 's officially time to begin the General Election against Joe Biden._
But I want to make one thing clear: I am not the _r eal_ victim in this vicious act of Election Interference.
...This is an attack on **YOU** - the voter.
**The Biden Administration is interfering in the Republican primary to try and effectively disenfranchise millions of voters and rob you of your vote.**
They don't want a political outsider in the White House. And they certainly don't want to have to face me in a General Election where they are _guaranteed_ to lose in a free and fair fight.
**But no matter how many times they arrest me, indict me, take my mugshot, intimidate me, or force me to stand trial as an innocent man, I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again.**
And I know that I have millions of supporters like you who will also NEVER SURRENDER our mission to save our country.

body:
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

clean_body: I'm at my wits' end, Friend. | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | "STAND WITH RYAN" So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "DONATE TODAY" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d07ecc5d9964d7091d591b041d41630&_e=if39gT8fX2avEfWa5xCALIinE6_PgH4cbI21tsXK96xnZ-lLQloBpFvMXEUgCt6EXwHGPcLXtu1c78Cny8K_TYyPpH3tEZNjtN0QpiCq3NWTgUSIvoyNyn0DwNRghEl0SG5VwaMLyHmkiRjWlxGcPHiOFf84x_YUweIwTlwlPaDcGcUynsa8ah3-4VqBmbzcP6Cyq2VoS73jdQo09PRnqU1OIXJTejnb5HCHHosAXjD--b7wSNxiz8aSQd8S8IpA7ZXCwOPy7PRBmqhe0Tj_G6msFpUoaCn8yQ8SRUuYfd4%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d07ecc5d9964d7091d591b041d41630&_e=if39gT8fX2avEfWa5xCALIinE6_PgH4cbI21tsXK96xnZ-lLQloBpFvMXEUgCt6EXwHGPcLXtu1c78Cny8K_TYyPpH3tEZNjtN0QpiCq3NWTgUSIvoyNyn0DwNRghEl0SG5VwaMLyHmkiRjWlxGcPIoV9OKexlVlY5e3RMCamX8C33oPuw8tdh6SxGCEzoU6FEim-PJLVeeDgzdNZVlh_yAd4czksyf4t4gIkpXpDv8nDKfZwESwQ-fX7Spmi5KQmFYZ_wa5me9z2vcJMm1eMhzwqUb6jqxpqPi1vYuZjCU%3D) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d07ecc5d9964d7091d591b041d41630&_e=if39gT8fX2avEfWa5xCALIinE6_PgH4cbI21tsXK96xnZ-lLQloBpFvMXEUgCt6EXwHGPcLXtu1c78Cny8K_TYyPpH3tEZNjtN0QpiCq3NWTgUSIvoyNyn0DwNRghEl0SG5VwaMLyHmkiRjWlxGcPBRsemTfq1Ve5c4fOzz9QQfIc6AmEpXczl5G7QYaXT_VGf2YHIgsRfWgd7Yu4repWwixHZsi7pveBTpoKOxIzpTKiwRQsVDPeF5otTSsi2qhx4Ma_lmVbasX2Nkwib87-Jlv_MRAGlaZN2gtc8Wbuz0%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d07ecc5d9964d7091d591b041d41630&_e=if39gT8fX2avEfWa5xCALIinE6_PgH4cbI21tsXK96xnZ-lLQloBpFvMXEUgCt6EXwHGPcLXtu1c78Cny8K_TYyPpH3tEZNjtN0QpiCq3NWTgUSIvoyNyn0DwNRghEl0SG5VwaMLyHmkiRjWlxGcPOYdbndJLFxBx6Axj1ZOYWVoMQXMGDQMdW6baTORwU9G-_E92XbrWV4mv7WX_ITBL4l4cQLO8S4t6Kk3FCZJntuJpGH8iySSwEFmU5G49jmBLUSINh0eRiXeZFeTVvtUnZi6dNEFItnhqEG9-_M_R-4%3D)

body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here’s the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I’m coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=arKAHUjp5LIbM1LiYEiT7w&sysid=1 "Can my colleagues and I

When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here’s the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I’m coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I ask for is your written endorsement. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news: We’re going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support. According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month. ---

Hello, Friend.
I am a member of a group of donors who have had enough of the Democrats outraising us every deadline just so they can steal the majority from us.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Biden to ban Formosa’s plastics plant in Cancer Alley
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962910?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A textbook case of environmental racism –** that’s what’s happening in Louisiana, Friend. More than 200 petrochemical plants and other toxic facilities are POISONING the air for the surrounding predominately Black communities in a region known as Cancer Alley. Imagine your community surrounded by towering smokestacks spewing dark clouds into the air and seemingly endless networks of snaking wires and pipelines. Imagine suffering from increased asthma rates and an **air pollution linked cancer rate 50 TIMES the national average!** Now imagine a massive corporation coming into your community to build another mega-polluting plastics complex. The people living in Cancer Alley don’t have to imagine – because this is their reality. **President Biden could revoke Formosa Plastics’ permit and STOP this plant in its tracks – _but we’re running out of time to convince him._** [**Stop the construction of this toxic plant in Cancer Alley before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962911?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962912?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Formosa plant would span 2,300 acres along the Mississippi River, harming the birds, fish and reptiles that depend on the local habitat. Plastic pellets like the ones that Formosa Plastics has a track record of _**illegally releasing from its factories**_ are often mistaken for food by wildlife – which can **INJURE or KILL animals!**
There is no shortage of reasons why this toxic plastics plant should be immediately banned from Cancer Alley. But so far, none of those reasons has pushed President Biden to act. **You could be the reason he changes his mind** – but every day we waste, this plant is one step closer to being finished. [**We need 1,492 more signatures to send to President Biden by midnight tonight! Please, Friend, add yours and help stop Formosa Plastics!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962913?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962912?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior Petrochemical Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Plastic pellets like the ones that Formosa Plastics has a track record of illegally releasing from its factories are often mistaken for food by wildlife – which can INJURE or KILL animals! There is no shortage of reasons why this toxic plastics plant should be immediately banned from Cancer Alley. But so far, none of those reasons has pushed President Biden to act. You could be the reason he changes his mind – but every day we waste, this plant is one step closer to being finished. == == Standing with you, Paloma Henriques Senior Petrochemical Campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

body:

**So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now** , before it’s too late.

---
**TODAY'S HEADLINE:**
---

Democrat Political operative and South Florida Tax Attorney Lawrence Caplan has filed a lawsuit challenging President Trump’s ability to run for President in 2024. Caplan cites Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, and is alleging that Trump’s “involvement” in January 6th, 2021 disqualifies him from the ballot.

It is worth noting that the 14th Amendment’s “disqualification clause” was created in response to the Civil War, and it was only established as a means to bar individuals who joined the Confederacy from ever serving in state or federal office. Caplan’s suit was filed on August 24th, 2023, just one day before President Trump’s arrest in Fulton County, Georgia, and contains a lot of misinformation and...

Student Banned for “Don’t Tread on Me” Patch

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j81O8zAQAJ9mfWvkrP8-H3z4oHIRCLjQQ49OYhMjm6ROQtS3Rw2F6-5odtblMcVwMaDuALGP3QSIwP4D4vm05rJ85KfDLo1-d5YvWVyXeA-I82X0f-RNUvnsYrpO1Z50xkkXfEe8qaVmUqDkSHojtG6Ediw0QYQGheKBsk577z2vJRMkGqTIqKZY15QJXv3znCvFJG2FCo5T4HQ7VLl6daUMQ67aIZNk-nkep63IAtq1DNXn0ia_TD94O2RAe2sFtF-A1mr3-PZ8OqojMLt9z_aHfX6QrwVJMd24xpTiJBVw-v5r-Q4AAP__SQxcYw) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8kMFuwyAQRL9mfYuFFwzJgUPbiFSq1J57xLBpqCAQsGXl76ukaa-zo7dPY1OJ4XjVoJ4B8RR8A0TgT4B4-VxTXb7T22ETC20u8j2NtyO-AOJ8LfTffEB6SjbEW6r2nddW2iP5jvQgd1yOKAV2J02WPDHH1VbwiVBsnVTMTzhwj8wJ3wWNDDnbMRwGxkfRb0kIpbhkblRHKxgIdn_U22G1teacepdTF_Vpnku7GxlAs9bcnxcXaWm_dZcToHm4Apq2TM3VUOaQzw3QLOdHMhFwc5-C7w_79Co_KnZV-7KGGEOTCgT7-kP-BAAA__-8rGMy)

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

On Monday, a public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw)
But the director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believes that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and is "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! (In an emergency meeting yesterday, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!)

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

I created the Tuttle Twins books to teach kids the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government. And I want to reach more kids like Jaiden to teach these ideas that are under threat in many schools.

**My mission is to distribute 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year. We need more Jaidens. I am urgently emailing you to ask for your help with this goal. Every $10 raised helps distribute a new book.**

[Can you donate $10, $20, or even $100 today and help distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuwyAQRL9mfbMFC4b4wKFt5B4q9d5TtcGbhAqCg7Gs_H0Vq-p1ZjTvUZpjOD8c2FdAvIZpAURQL4B4_9pSWX_Sx3sbZ27v5jP1zxLfALE-Zv5f_p10nCjEZ2qPzeTI0Jmnhp00gzI9Go3N1ZEnRSdDyFqyH6w_eTvxwMKTOhwm1QSHApUYBEopVK-7A2ttrTLC9_ZMWoAWO6gjuVEpOafO59REd611XnajEXBc2K-FuxhOXCotXS4XwLGutUauW7gtbY6PNAffkq8h30CNa03flUsCddyKBDSU8nqroI5SCNEUN81biDEsxoIWl13C5_QbAAD__4QyZLg)

I had the fortune of breaking Jaiden's story; he's an avid reader of my Tuttle Twins books, which teach kids what their rights are and why they should stand up for them -- just like Jaiden now is. So he and his mother reached out to ask for help highlighting what the school had done to him.

But one thing we can do now is inspire millions more kids to believe in the ideas of liberty.

While I can't control what schools teach, I can do the next best thing - bring the ideas of liberty to libraries, schools, and families.

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw)

Since I started the Tuttle Twins in 2011, we have distributed over 5 MILLION copies globally!

Freedom is popular with the younger generation. But it is our duty to bring them pro-liberty books and resources to conceptualize these ideas.

[Here is how we plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw)

1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies for education at home.

2. The Libertas Institute plans to place copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.

3. To do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. **It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**

[Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvwyAUhH_N82YLHhjsgaFt5A6VuneqCH5JqCAQwLLy76tEVde7032fjTn4092AfgXEi18rIIJ4AcTb1x7L9hM_3vuQqb-pzzg-SnwDxHbP9L_8OxkoWh8eqT50q7HKnmjtyHA1CzWikthdjEKcxaSdc1rMq5yQuyMqTkc-MY4oO2-QoWAzQ86ZGOUwkZRaC8XcqE9WMpDsCRos320pKcXBpdgFc2kt16fRArhUcluhIfgjlWbrkMoZcGlba4Ha7q-1T-Ees3e9dc2nK4hla_G7UYkgDnvhXTFr3n0IvioNkp2fUJfibwAAAP__HxNeWw)

clean_body: Student Banned for “Don’t Tread on Me” Patch | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, On Monday, a public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack. But the director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believes that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and is "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! (In an emergency meeting yesterday, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!) Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it. What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden? We can. I created the Tuttle Twins books to teach kids the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government. And I want to reach more kids like Jaiden to teach these ideas that are under threat in many schools. My mission is to distribute 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year. We need more Jaidens. I am urgently emailing you to ask for your help with this goal. Every $10 raised helps distribute a new book. I had the fortune of breaking Jaiden's story; he's an avid reader of my Tuttle Twins books, which teach kids what their rights are and why they should stand up for them -- just like Jaiden now is. So he and his mother reached out to ask for help highlighting what the school had done to him. But one thing we can do now is inspire millions more kids to believe in the ideas of liberty. While I can't control what schools teach, I can do the next best thing - bring the ideas of liberty to libraries, schools, and families. Since I started the Tuttle Twins in 2011, we have distributed over 5 MILLION copies globally! Freedom is popular with the younger generation. But it is our duty to bring them pro-liberty books and resources to conceptualize these ideas. 1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies for education at home. 2. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlma21cd6cka98o76vtmipahd9m4nd7dpp1bfju8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdhm6o74c5h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb5m5u4io0s885jpu5lljou0jst4um4clo0qf7g0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdhm6o74c5h2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zahu8t0rcf1po41lng5152jipm8j0vgj0pcpee30_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdhm6o74c5h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlj4uas1hi39j1fufbee06noci7ut5p54ga755ro_rp22sh2s8i66p76cdhm6o74c5h2bs)

President Biden is desperate

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: DEFCON 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=480292ef589b41d2862ebded081cf839&_e=5R-3F3aZj_qQ9f929zp9C_LkrS6osAnLV5XiW02HRVj13_3Qa3TSrRV4E36Wom3c2ItmoES9OIhLr960Xr_eYSYfIR1BpEMdO39elo4f8jlz7mOM-jZbF_EoY7nGwBUBGYwq_Aaqjv7OOdcxJY_FiRJYjA5XZlX9GwaNndNNeFwWipl_d7y_eTtbySUHaSacTFipxEI5Z0KrM5dZwrYnFC9DEasV6eUH5kwOLvx3q4rZVLtBvbEw1AvbUzzmR1CrfaVy27tHBA266FnCdNOSgRXWO623St_GJLDB4_VowrHGel84XvmQztN180tzi8CkSz98_-fGRXKXhxXynB1Fh1TTiA92LU19UuDZVwk54_LqlCWWdRQk2j8v6VflwmCAZkC3_jWcYShOIVQxdBsIdOHPRL4pf3AZWQNgIFwK7Fd7qe24_e7oLnWRZoqNI12T "STAND WITH RYAN")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Is the federal government about to bankrupt America? – update from Mississippi’s leading free market advocacy organization
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11571058?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Here is the most important graph in America. **It shows how federal spending has increased exponentially.
---
|
---
| **This massive splurge in spending will determine what taxes you pay, how much tax your children pay, and how fast the US economy grows.**

**Since 2020, the US government has managed to get through $25 trillion.** To put that into perspective, that is spending equivalent to the entire output of 12 Canada’s, or 8 Britain’s, or 6 Germany’s all in a mere three years.

**As Europe has demonstrated, when government spending gets to a certain level, an economy loses its mojo.** Back in 2000, US government spending was equal to 17 percent of GDP. By 2022, it had reached 25 percent of GDP. **We risk reaching the point at which the American economy is ‘Europeanized’. It is not a happy prospect.**
---
|
---
_Don’t follow the European model of high spending, high taxes and low growth...._
| **America has a government spending problem.** Last year, the US took $5 trillion in taxes against spending of $6.5 trillion. That meant we had to borrow $1.5 trillion to fill the gap.

**It is now 22 years since the US government ran a budget surplus. **The past four presidents – Bush the younger, Obama, Trump and Biden - have run such large deficits, they make Bill Clinton, who largely balanced the books, look like Milton Friedman (Clinton, it should be noted, was able to balance the books thanks to the effect of Ronald Reagan's 1980's tax cuts, which led to a sustained boom.)

**Add up twenty years of cumulative deficits, and the US federal government now has accumulated a national debt in excess of $30 trillion.** That is almost $100,000 of debt for every person in America.
---
|
---
_Twenty years of spending money like drunken sailors...._
| **What, you might ask, does the federal government do with all this money?** America might have become the most indebted nation in history, but it is hardly as though the federal government provides us all with Scandinavian levels of social care.

Here is a handy graphic that illustrates what the government does with our money. **It is worth noting that the deficit is roughly equivalent to what the federal government spends on social security or transfers to states each year. **
---
|
---
_Money in, money out...._
| **At some point, America is going to have to stop accumulating debt and cut spending. **In order to do that, I suspect we will need to see some far reaching, fundamental changes to the way the America is governed.

**Large swathes of the administrative state – the Department of Education, that alphabet soup of federal agencies in Washington – will need to be shut down. I was intrigued to hear Vivek Ramaswamy, with whom I had lunch in Nashville a year ago, talking about how one might do that. **It is perhaps the most important issue in American politics.

America is a great success story. We must not allow a fiscally incontinent federal bureaucracy to ruin it.

Have a great weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2b2d78ba4c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| Ps. Every time I am invited to speak to young Americans, my confidence in this country's future is restored. This week I spoke alongside Senator Wicker at Mississippi State.
---
|
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

America is a great success story. We must not allow a fiscally incontinent federal bureaucracy to ruin it. Have a great weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Ps. Every time I am invited to speak to young Americans, my confidence in this country's future is restored. This week I spoke alongside Senator Wicker at Mississippi State. | | | |

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2279437172443108db910c4a6d83181&_e=xIgAv-OfwMPe2FsjiqN_jhiJ9VXvpql9qdTVeseFCENuGvm40KBcDDz68TIIXqd8kzf1kfGxTcZvw7E0UWg9IXswZaWw3iAYAgiPKA3XSkOF3qGL0Zkg7kmWEyGi0v7-7YPQqv1dacF67BViNtjnMjfoD-GFLbpvylIBq5smhI56CKVnwHvBlT9CrM8KzQ6vY8VeXGCFWYEonO6pe_9yWh5LKu5lMvOrQUsvI5RifRLvGHSb-xQsyz0S6tB21Sb6tR9gEcn3Uqmr7vqqfv6oUtIWWtgR8NH2PzovhpHkTJaTkPvus6KJOAY2HjYFnU_gNvCMMLlnIW5LDhJvRg9_vbWm3l8nEicXF7lxwAQEx1wN7Qx1j1KcK4jYgGaesKcbrXVGZ08l7PoAqHzy_xf1BMWKnm7U7S_Jm9x6fBeu0wQ%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2279437172443108db910c4a6d83181&_e=xIgAv-OfwMPe2FsjiqN_jhiJ9VXvpql9qdTVeseFCENuGvm40KBcDDz68TIIXqd8kzf1kfGxTcZvw7E0UWg9IXswZaWw3iAYAgiPKA3XSkOF3qGL0Zkg7kmWEyGi0v7-7YPQqv1dacF67BViNtjnMjfoD-GFLbpvylIBq5smhI56CKVnwHvBlT9CrM8KzQ6vY8VeXGCFWYEonO6pe_9yWh5LKu5lMvOrQUsvI5RifRLvGHSb-xQsyz0S6tB21Sb6tR9gEcn3Uqmr7vqqfv6oUuHXAqXonO6qq57eJdbtS0dbV9g8Gca42EyQH9hzZIOSlal4SVNfgZB_8XL16jXgAcGcp51_MydGSAnjdgy42ry-z7jEoyOuXjIoUYGme9VWlMl0Z_nw3Z6eed5sBokdwiCEcurBAhgEML_CBoZyXCg%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2279437172443108db910c4a6d83181&_e=xIgAv-OfwMPe2FsjiqN_jhiJ9VXvpql9qdTVeseFCENuGvm40KBcDDz68TIIXqd8kzf1kfGxTcZvw7E0UWg9IXswZaWw3iAYAgiPKA3XSkOF3qGL0Zkg7kmWEyGi0v7-7YPQqv1dacF67BViNtjnMjfoD-GFLbpvylIBq5smhI56CKVnwHvBlT9CrM8KzQ6vY8VeXGCFWYEonO6pe_9yWh5LKu5lMvOrQUsvI5RifRLvGHSb-xQsyz0S6tB21Sb6tR9gEcn3Uqmr7vqqfv6oUj9JkoIih2OA5MvgI8DPGs9kq7G2qAxTXDl_d5raWn2so2Sw66ry128oN39JEmmq_v6GeIi9cOmVzFgmmpst50ceww49cVmczjlRsb4QxEzulOoZIZ9UOZ0WjWZOmjStFlUi6tLsBTLGY-JRDWB0FHk%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2279437172443108db910c4a6d83181&_e=xIgAv-OfwMPe2FsjiqN_jhiJ9VXvpql9qdTVeseFCENuGvm40KBcDDz68TIIXqd8kzf1kfGxTcZvw7E0UWg9IXswZaWw3iAYAgiPKA3XSkOF3qGL0Zkg7kmWEyGi0v7-7YPQqv1dacF67BViNtjnMjfoD-GFLbpvylIBq5smhI56CKVnwHvBlT9CrM8KzQ6vY8VeXGCFWYEonO6pe_9yWh5LKu5lMvOrQUsvI5RifRLvGHSb-xQsyz0S6tB21Sb6tR9gEcn3Uqmr7vqqfv6oUjaoNsTNjf0laieJOaM6DH3Ob8eQTDP8CoeDZelR_p-WcdhgCvIdcLn_yFbqap_8WDf6RlJqK72FmIZmFLM91PMVJVW7cIE6WqIiQVuV5mIDbJ0vxDXjSzGzUZgAZr58NixJhjuVF60zG-lx5QvDzBw%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2279437172443108db910c4a6d83181&_e=xIgAv-OfwMPe2FsjiqN_jhiJ9VXvpql9qdTVeseFCENuGvm40KBcDDz68TIIXqd8kzf1kfGxTcZvw7E0UWg9IXswZaWw3iAYAgiPKA3XSkOF3qGL0Zkg7kmWEyGi0v7-7YPQqv1dacF67BViNtjnMjfoD-GFLbpvylIBq5smhI56CKVnwHvBlT9CrM8KzQ6vY8VeXGCFWYEonO6pe_9yWh5LKu5lMvOrQUsvI5RifRLvGHSb-xQsyz0S6tB21Sb6tR9gEcn3Uqmr7vqqfv6oUjrZlbUgV9LU-hHufeg51pNK1MCfHMesVr9RQP13F4QGt9wdNpmqXMH6TML7SQcH4P1URMRK_WnKUdewgc0yvzqh7nBR0MbhYLG_e-06u3N-lLfhNYAExD2YGJ_KcJ7sK8xTXIBqmGprfWEQv2iA1Ms%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Reminder: A Rebellion for Our Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
Will you comply with another round of mask mandates?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcmmIevOgZVXPbJl7Ssq3DOtMjdxzPwSICtJIxJygIRwWRKq_GA21IesO8qN-Ks2ayiO095J45r3vmS_QE93miP1CptKSP09lA64tQX-X4ByAr-RMgvpsrHHk63YiXsu3cNWQIz-3xijjwq8oknVxA==&c=Xj1jvEzT4iK0Wrn5ecSWw336tNwimgLweujbnWnZfr9e2GTbXeVj4w==&ch=6KRxjqcahwEvKenPno6UEWGaXpdkCGTSpEQ1qhPKKoW3J3i3OzSNfg==)
---
| Peter,
---
It's time to channel our inner Samuel Adams and stir the pot of U.S. liberty once again! Morris Brown College in Georgia and the LA County Department of Health are pulling a deja vu with mask mandates.

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcmmIevOgZVXPbJl7Ssq3DOtMjdxzPwSICtJIxJygIRwWRKq_GA21CvJ8zDhY-dlxNnirW4GTRgR8o1-eTJ7wWno2EaGLu-Ph38HOkR3Va_dKm3j2hKAvJ3-A6ZQKv99xECwFzIduKTFV5gpVb7JcuD68t_oFju2A6W5zOyV4NZaJAzvh3Hx8jUc37UMlJManOOLsfvW6W0=&c=Xj1jvEzT4iK0Wrn5ecSWw336tNwimgLweujbnWnZfr9e2GTbXeVj4w==&ch=6KRxjqcahwEvKenPno6UEWGaXpdkCGTSpEQ1qhPKKoW3J3i3OzSNfg==)
---
Let's NOT replay history's greatest hits of calculated overreach and authoritarian compliance. We're not here to be mindless puppets of a Biden masked theater. We're here to remind the world that we're the land of the free and the home of the brave. We won't be tangled in mandates that are suspiciously timed and located to prime the pump FOR A RERUN of massive spending bills from DC that will 'combat another threat to the human race'. We've seen this bait and switch before. Never Again!
And that's because of truth warriors, such as Senators Ron Johnson and Rand Paul, who bravely challenged the powers that be, have demanded transparency, and refuse to take any nonsense. As your next Non-Compliance Freedom Senator from Nevada, I pledge to you that I will stand with them in this fight for truth, accountability, and liberty.
And speaking of truth, remember those who were cast aside for daring to question the narrative? The ones who got silenced, attacked, or worse, simply for wanting to know the facts? Well, guess what? The age of the silenced is over. The silent majority will be heard, and I will be that voice along with President Donald Trump..
I will NOT comply with another round of these nonsensical mandates. [It's time to put our foot down and say, "Enough is enough!"](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcmmIevOgZVXPbJl7Ssq3DOtMjdxzPwSICtJIxJygIRwWRKq_GA21CvJ8zDhY-dlxNnirW4GTRgR8o1-eTJ7wWno2EaGLu-Ph38HOkR3Va_dKm3j2hKAvJ3-A6ZQKv99xECwFzIduKTFV5gpVb7JcuD68t_oFju2A6W5zOyV4NZaJAzvh3Hx8jUc37UMlJManOOLsfvW6W0=&c=Xj1jvEzT4iK0Wrn5ecSWw336tNwimgLweujbnWnZfr9e2GTbXeVj4w==&ch=6KRxjqcahwEvKenPno6UEWGaXpdkCGTSpEQ1qhPKKoW3J3i3OzSNfg==)
---
| [WE WILL NOT COMPLY » ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcmmIevOgZVXPbJl7Ssq3DOtMjdxzPwSICtJIxJygIRwWRKq_GA21CvJ8zDhY-dlxNnirW4GTRgR8o1-eTJ7wWno2EaGLu-Ph38HOkR3Va_dKm3j2hKAvJ3-A6ZQKv99xECwFzIduKTFV5gpVb7JcuD68t_oFju2A6W5zOyV4NZaJAzvh3Hx8jUc37UMlJManOOLsfvW6W0=&c=Xj1jvEzT4iK0Wrn5ecSWw336tNwimgLweujbnWnZfr9e2GTbXeVj4w==&ch=6KRxjqcahwEvKenPno6UEWGaXpdkCGTSpEQ1qhPKKoW3J3i3OzSNfg==)

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcmmIevOgZVXPbJl7Ssq3DOtMjdxzPwSICtJIxJygIRwWRKq_GA21CvJ8zDhY-dlxNnirW4GTRgR8o1-eTJ7wWno2EaGLu-Ph38HOkR3Va_dKm3j2hKAvJ3-A6ZQKv99xECwFzIduKTFV5gpVb7JcuD68t_oFju2A6W5zOyV4NZaJAzvh3Hx8jUc37UMlJManOOLsfvW6W0=&c=Xj1jvEzT4iK0Wrn5ecSWw336tNwimgLweujbnWnZfr9e2GTbXeVj4w==&ch=6KRxjqcahwEvKenPno6UEWGaXpdkCGTSpEQ1qhPKKoW3J3i3OzSNfg==)

clean_body: Will you comply with another round of mask mandates? | | | | == | Peter, It's time to channel our inner Samuel Adams and stir the pot of U.S. liberty once again! Morris Brown College in Georgia and the LA County Department of Health are pulling a deja vu with mask mandates. == Let's NOT replay history's greatest hits of calculated overreach and authoritarian compliance. We're not here to be mindless puppets of a Biden masked theater. We're here to remind the world that we're the land of the free and the home of the brave. We won't be tangled in mandates that are suspiciously timed and located to prime the pump FOR A RERUN of massive spending bills from DC that will 'combat another threat to the human race'. We've seen this bait and switch before. Never Again! And that's because of truth warriors, such as Senators Ron Johnson and Rand Paul, who bravely challenged the powers that be, have demanded transparency, and refuse to take any nonsense. As your next Non-Compliance Freedom Senator from Nevada, I pledge to you that I will stand with them in this fight for truth, accountability, and liberty. And speaking of truth, remember those who were cast aside for daring to question the narrative? The ones who got silenced, attacked, or worse, simply for wanting to know the facts? Well, guess what? The age of the silenced is over. The silent majority will be heard, and I will be that voice along with President Donald Trump.. I will NOT comply with another round of these nonsensical mandates. == | == == | == == | == | == We are the guardians of our nation's destiny, and together, we shall prevail! Across our nation, hard-working farmers fuel our people and our economy. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff3d227cd47ac6133fac1bfda87c114e358383828ad14322618e24100000734dba9928e8023c557da1c817de000e60228a2ddb6a83e839652 https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff3d227cd47ac6133fac1bfda87c114e358383828ad14322618e24100000734dba9928e8023c557da1c817de000e60228a2ddb6a83e839652 Without their relentless work to feed and fuel us, our nation would not be where it is today. When I was elected to Congress in 2022, I made it my mission to protect and defend all Americans. Now, making sure that our farmers and agricultural workers are shown the recognition they deserve is an integral part of that mission. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff86877810de07e53cf1425a3daecaf294c8a761c83978bbddbb6cf86e7f61b721cf0858d5e28fbb2ef32f9e8b60791737542ae1afeb1733a This is why I’m sending our farmers a Thank You card, to let them know how grateful I am every day for their hard work. Will you join me in saying thank you, Peter? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff86877810de07e53cf1425a3daecaf294c8a761c83978bbddbb6cf86e7f61b721cf0858d5e28fbb2ef32f9e8b60791737542ae1afeb1733a SIGN THE CARD It would mean so much to me and them to know how grateful you are for all that they do. If you can, please take a moment to sign the card and leave a message of appreciation. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff86877810de07e53cf1425a3daecaf294c8a761c83978bbddbb6cf86e7f61b721cf0858d5e28fbb2ef32f9e8b60791737542ae1afeb1733a SAY THANK YOU https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870ff86877810de07e53cf1425a3daecaf294c8a761c83978bbddbb6cf86e7f61b721cf0858d5e28fbb2ef32f9e8b60791737542ae1afeb1733a SIGN THE CARD Don’t wait and miss this opportunity, Peter. Thank you, – Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870f1d1808174b8f9ac756f52395701875ac150ffb544b182aee1b24407e67ea9e96d450294366c579938d9d07580cf8f7ecbd2d9adafc55e397 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870f300f4d028c58b4c6c1f0172a96b938dd5088f446469158d6c7ba27b8b83c45c63da035b6fbbdd4b80023424da84fb5656f620bd7161e01c1 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=7c6fcb3d63b3870f041140e8ab8a2cff54ba90ef93948f1a75223b964db276df0d599e9fa0f7a80ed6141a52e03ecf6363244824cb0f30c9b2e6eaff6999d2f2 here . SAY THANK YOU SIGN THE CARD Don’t wait and miss this opportunity, Peter. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? body:
Hi Peter,

I know we just finished our end of month push for August, but September is going to be our biggest month yet.

It's the last month of the FIRST quarter of our campaign, and quarterly deadlines are huge.

**These numbers are where we really show if we can stack up to the competition, and with Tim Kaine and the Left pulling in money from every corner of the Washington establishment, we can 't afford to ease up on the gas. **

If we're going to pull off this win, we have to show Virginia that we have what it takes to defeat the incumbent. It won't be easy, but with hard work and dedication, I know it's possible.

[**Please, click here to pitch in now so we can start September strong and CRUSH our first quarter and FEC Deadline.**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=40caf48066324fb7bdce0ec8e4dfb510&_e=GbyvO8xsY2sOqmBh1iMH5Z0eN9ReiFh6YWQoEWluYsgWOA-4u58a30pPpZzpZ2Wsygsh96j_xI42NmcQk1HZbOjCXgWMZadewoEEULiDNg4Zv7ZcmykKstPUpUnm0ru6hDauJH20PRP9cjFV500vKiOhMOzOK98ynwtS3KL-u3Mg9UTR2UcEVxWlxBUarzcw3_Z-x8In5Xt8tTccJAD3rO1eMoetc8SLhSVQJ7p220vGtlHmVGHpF5vpKB-6yDHdGY6l8Ib64rT0W84px2M7_6-AN06OozV-gE6Rg6NBYBxkHhgstIKR2gwt29lDbMgZ-W8_z-z1Xpc9xqzeHWVUFg%3D%3D)

If we're going to take back our Majority, we need the resources to defend ourselves from the Left's attacks and lies.

The Democrats hate me because I'm living proof that their woke, oppressive narrative isn't true.

I'm a proud immigrant, an Asian-American, and a combat veteran. I'm not oppressed because of my story - I'm empowered because of it. I owe America my life, and unlike the Left, I'm not about to repay her with slander and lies.

The Left isn't waiting until 2024 to start their fight, and neither will we. This first quarter means everything, and I need your help.

**If you 're with me, I'm asking you to pitch in a few dollars right now with the link below and help us meet our FIRST quarterly deadline of the campaign!**
**[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=40caf48066324fb7bdce0ec8e4dfb510&_e=GbyvO8xsY2sOqmBh1iMH5Z0eN9ReiFh6YWQoEWluYsgWOA-4u58a30pPpZzpZ2Wsygsh96j_xI42NmcQk1HZbOjCXgWMZadewoEEULiDNg4Zv7ZcmykKstPUpUnm0ru6hDauJH20PRP9cjFV500vKiOhMOzOK98ynwtS3KL-u3Mg9UTR2UcEVxWlxBUarzcw-NFkBz7e-3fcm4a2AhMhVxWdqou5jxoph2qTiLt4jYapF6g3qFDp3lUTqceo0CXVBUO46XIWCr1I9shCkQxrMiod2-QJKPRG8Smsg062aephU_5nwx83zs_PqfqKptbC_oGrDbSFKvhH98oRetoggg%3D%3D)**
