name: Ruben Gallego
subject: if you’ve got a minute, I wanted to share something with you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, I just want to thank you for your help last month, and through our final push.
A ton of people helped us out, and I’m really grateful for that.
If you’ve got a minute, I wanted to share something with you (this isn’t a fundraising email — I promise).
I was an infantryman in Lima Company, 3rd Battalion, 25th Marines. We fought in Anbar, Iraq. They called us “Lucky Lima” because we didn’t have a single casualty in the first two months of our deployment.
Our luck didn’t hold though. By the time our deployment was over we had more casualties than any unit in the Iraq War.
The guys in my unit grew up a lot like me. Some were from working class families, some were first or second generation, some were from reservations. Most were dirt poor. All Americans.
I joined the Marines to serve my country, but I’m running for Senate for the guys I served with.
There aren’t enough politicians who work for the veterans, the working moms and dads, or the kids sleeping on the floor like I did.
They’ve been let down too many times, and I’m running to change that.
Since we launched, thousands of people have joined us. More than a hundred thousand people have chipped in. It’s stunning, really, and it means a lot to me.
And if you’ve read this far, I’d like to know a little bit about why you’re here.
[**Could you take this official issue survey so I can understand what’s important to you, and what you hope to see us get done in Washington? It’ll help me campaign, and it will help me be a better Senator.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/issues_survey_2023/?source=em230902-1-subs&refcode2=1106.734936.vpWsK9&akid=1106%2E734936%2EvpWsK9)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/issues_survey_2023/?source=em230902-1-subs&refcode2=1106.734936.vpWsK9&akid=1106%2E734936%2EvpWsK9)
I’ve still got a tough relationship with the word luck. But I know I’m lucky that you have my back.
So thanks again, Peter.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=1106%2E734936%2EvpWsK9). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1106_734936_vpWsK9&akid=1106%2E734936%2EvpWsK9)

subject: Join me in endorsing Ryan Mackenzie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
body:

[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=20207c072c0c4d679895c0924a43ea83&_e=N1w8ZDmCQYXHXIOMCGz68fbs9W2gl4kq6TBi1vgsZDuA_xouj9egtiC8yv3SdIBNWI5ya-sYFWZe7g8ZoA-m5LL8D-bm-KGWrszgoJbj119CZ_vt7vMWOtVgGCqes-KX0hvOOaKojkizzAhIucYjGmb1UAp9oHVMQseAAl4N-n2q7Re5rgHJugNMB5irZTjuigWfyjL2kfl3ajL-j3YfBIFR1xL7XF6wsMTlz77Ov_PO1gQB-9VN1XdQt9Os4w7cfeIzuYDpIX4N3WY20yMI4C9Ci4U4UWgLOAcGRLDPWVxsi2HPqovoNHNdykGsAwiZkVppThXcXbA0aQuOikTysa5a5Ets0ljpLyFgiWaTDyjEGH2DPrA40RqnmfSM4B7te55iAFhgfS1NXhERhOUQJLuivjQVZJyUYtbP3ewT1ZA%3D)

Fellow American,

Being chosen to represent our nation, our history, our values, and our people is an honor unlike any other.

I know because when President Trump asked me to serve as the U.S. Ambassador to Denmark, I felt the weight of the responsibility asked of me.

In that moment – and in the weeks and months to come – I learned something that I thought I knew, but didn’t fully grasp: how important it is to elect strong leaders in every branch of our government if we are to fulfill the promise our nation was founded upon.

[**That is why I am endorsing Ryan Mackenzie for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=20207c072c0c4d679895c0924a43ea83&_e=N1w8ZDmCQYXHXIOMCGz68fbs9W2gl4kq6TBi1vgsZDuA_xouj9egtiC8yv3SdIBNWI5ya-sYFWZe7g8ZoA-m5LL8D-bm-KGWrszgoJbj119CZ_vt7vMWOtVgGCqes-KX0hvOOaKojkizzAhIucYjGmb1UAp9oHVMQseAAl4N-n2q7Re5rgHJugNMB5irZTjuigWfyjL2kfl3ajL-j3YfBIFR1xL7XF6wsMTlz77Ov_PO1gQB-9VN1XdQt9Os4w7cfeIzuYDpIX4N3WY20yMI4AEkQCTxN4ABP3OSV-gpx4QOzA5hUkAZH9cQZ8HpW4UxxQkH521M70uj1wXU8XEAx6ISVs12IXe2NWRZ2GWm4xwz5LGEoowfvgQ5G22pn3T167NqA_8ENpNbOArH-GmQ1YjcjqGi0PAp3Iwh_B2TBDg%3D)

Ryan Mackenzie is the America First candidate Pennsylvania needs. Our country is in real danger and the only way to turn it around is with leaders who are as proven as they are principled. Ryan fits the bill, and I am pleased to support him in his campaign for Congress.

Ryan is 100% committed to restoring the conservative policies that were so successful under President Trump’s administration. In fact, he is the only candidate who both shares that vision for America AND has a proven record of backing up what he says with real action and results!

From fighting illegal immigration to protecting American jobs and workers, Ryan has always put America First. He will do the same in Washington.

**But Ryan can’t do it without our help!**

[**Please join me in supporting Ryan today by contributing to his campaign today. All you need to do is visit RyanForPa.com!**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=20207c072c0c4d679895c0924a43ea83&_e=N1w8ZDmCQYXHXIOMCGz68fbs9W2gl4kq6TBi1vgsZDuA_xouj9egtiC8yv3SdIBNWI5ya-sYFWZe7g8ZoA-m5LL8D-bm-KGWrszgoJbj119CZ_vt7vMWOtVgGCqes-KX0hvOOaKojkizzAhIucYjGmb1UAp9oHVMQseAAl4N-n2q7Re5rgHJugNMB5irZTjuigWfyjL2kfl3ajL-j3YfBIFR1xL7XF6wsMTlz77Ov_PO1gQB-9VN1XdQt9Os4w7cfeIzuYDpIX4N3WY20yMI4H4u20bC0Wu_DaxR0hVN3FcfnJ9AOFJ08HDSD4F6TyKGSIi2gcSFiY_h-Vb7q84QSR_JV59SW-ualkFdtvYxa48zBrDZHT6O-Ol-8Wj58pWRtCwgpCELr6Jyfel4a7umfWLyNiHmOrbkShCjOUdxHwI%3D)

Please, if you care about the future of our great nation, join me in supporting Ryan Mackenzie today.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=20207c072c0c4d679895c0924a43ea83&_e=N1w8ZDmCQYXHXIOMCGz68fbs9W2gl4kq6TBi1vgsZDuA_xouj9egtiC8yv3SdIBNWI5ya-sYFWZe7g8ZoA-m5LL8D-bm-KGWrszgoJbj119CZ_vt7vMWOtVgGCqes-KX0hvOOaKojkizzAhIucYjGmb1UAp9oHVMQseAAl4N-n2q7Re5rgHJugNMB5irZTjuigWfyjL2kfl3ajL-j3YfBIFR1xL7XF6wsMTlz77Ov_PO1gQB-9VN1XdQt9Os4w7cfeIzuYDpIX4N3WY20yMI4FVJGYyNi1nWO5ZjLdtX4iwFmR4Hz3RRvO3qsOUgsDf5DcBSsZ9xMmgyt3FmpZAKBArRgoTel8E1dTaDo9fBd0qWT5zMxVOFwoFxfwDwjL31AF77XZAmGzcd2zmSMW8hMT_RdoF_lrJOOOOIf2dhlIE%3D)
Carla Sands
Fmr. Ambassador to Denmark

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.”

In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

[ **JOIN TEAM MACKENZIE**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=20207c072c0c4d679895c0924a43ea83&_e=N1w8ZDmCQYXHXIOMCGz68fbs9W2gl4kq6TBi1vgsZDuA_xouj9egtiC8yv3SdIBNWI5ya-sYFWZe7g8ZoA-m5LL8D-bm-KGWrszgoJbj119CZ_vt7vMWOtVgGCqes-KX0hvOOaKojkizzAhIucYjGmb1UAp9oHVMQseAAl4N-n2q7Re5rgHJugNMB5irZTjuigWfyjL2kfl3ajL-j3YfBIFR1xL7XF6wsMTlz77Ov_PO1gQB-9VN1XdQt9Os4w7cfeIzuYDpIX4N3WY20yMI4J4ES_MB0-dOaM552VFclcT6UIFUBepeoz4bJbZebX25wwUArFd66C5t1MYGIl8WiMpAu2IwhIT8g3VZ91xzAFEcVGwVpMYpr2poKkxDkOhfzu0gERqmUsYoi810Htzo78hZkUnz771gTvx3Qq7fq58%3D)

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Two MAJOR elections Tuesday & shocking 2024 poll results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Special Election for Congress Tuesday! | Bernie Rallies for
Aaron Regunberg | Vote Gilliard for SC Senate Tuesday | New Endorsement:
Jovanka Beckles for CA Senate | Poll Results: Dems 2024 Trouble? | Raise
the Wage Actions | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9693?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

As we celebrate Labor Day — the nation’s marker for the end of summer and
our return to work — Our Revolution is proud to stand with a resurgent
labor movement rising up to take on corporate bosses.

As we reflect on the hard-fought progress of generations, Our Revolution
members nationwide are fighting for higher wages, union rights, and
policies that put people over profits. We’re also working hard to elect
the next generation of progressive leaders who will work for all of us.

The Post-Labor Day election season will heat up immediately with TWO
special elections this Tuesday: Aaron Regunberg for U.S. Congress (RI-1)
and Wendell Gilliard for State Senate (SC- 42).

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9693?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Donate now to fund our voter turnout work up to the minute polls close
on Election Day Tuesday — and read more about these two amazing candidates
below!

BUT FIRST —

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Let’s get into the results of our 2024 Temperature Check — and why
Democrats cannot take the progressive vote for granted.

We polled thousands of Our Revolution members, and 41% told us they’re
feeling depressed, angry, or unmotivated about the 2024 election. A
quarter said they plan to vote for someone other than Joe Biden in the
Democratic Primaries.

In our online Dem Primary Poll, 44% said they are likely to vote for
Biden, 41% said they are likely to vote for another candidate, and 7.6%
not likely to vote.

Meanwhile, despite Democrats pointing out all the horrors of Trump,
national polls show him tied with or beating Biden in 2024. Democrats have
a problem: The base is not excited about a Trump/Biden rematch and tacking
to the right is crushing enthusiasm among key voting blocs.

Voters want to see action on healthcare, climate, unions, and more — and
the President still has time to act. There’s no getting around it,
Democrats need to raise the standard of living for voters and go beyond
messaging to show whose side they’re on.

That’s why Senator Bernie Sanders was out [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9719?si=23Lg7peAW3N5Esib%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]speaking in New Hampshire and
Philadelphia last weekend, calling on Democrats to lay out a strong, clear
agenda for working people in 2024.

“What the democrats have got to do is begin to engage in class politics,
to understand we’ve been in class war for decades and the wrong class is
winning,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9720?s=20%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Bernie told Ali Velshi in a TV interview.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

In an academic study of Our Revolution members by SUNY and William & Mary
colleges, 47% say progressive groups should probably or definitely mount a
nomination challenge to Biden in the 2024 Democratic Primary, and another
15% were unsure.

Willingness to be involved in a Biden 2024 reelection campaign is down
even from 2020 to just 47% if Biden is the nominee, the study showed.

There’s a serious risk we could face another Trump term in 2024 — unless
Democrats can deliver tangible results for working people in order to earn
trust and votes.

That’s why Our Revolution and our allies are working overtime to unify the
progressive movement and focus our pressure on key demands like student
debt relief, an end to medical debt, and urgent climate action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Our movement is critical to defeating the far right and advancing
policies to address the many crises facing our country. If you’re not
already a monthly member of Our Revolution, sign up today!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9693?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Aaron Regunberg has started to pull away as the front-runner in this
crowded field for Congress just days ahead of Election Day — good timing
that comes after a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9722?si=Edn09nFL6LHah0VR%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]big rally with Bernie Sanders last weekend.

Our Revolution members felt the excitement in the room for Regunberg, who
has delivered paid sick days and higher wages for Rhode Islanders. In his
day job as a lawyer, he’s held Big Oil accountable for environmental
crimes.

“Friends, we're gonna win this thing, and we're going to take these fights
all the way to Congress," Aaron told the crowd. “This is a district that
can support more than just another Democrat, we can elect someone who is
going to organize up there.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9693?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Bernie addressed a packed house for Aaron, saying: “This is not just about
electing another member of Congress. We need leadership with the courage
to take on the incredible power of the 1 percent.”

“Brothers and sisters, this is a fight that Aaron alone will not be
waging, that I alone will not be waging — now is the time for a political
revolution of working families coming together to tell the people on top
this country belongs to all of us,” Bernie said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9693?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1022&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]An election for Congress like this is rare — and a special election is
all about turnout in these final days. Donate $5 or $10 to help us
mobilize as many voters as possible in Rhode Island by Tuesday!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Our Revolution is also working to get out the vote in South Carolina,
where State Rep. Wendell Gilliard is running for State Senate in South
Carolina (SC-42) in a special election this Tuesday!

Gilliard kicked off his campaign with an economic justice bus tour and led
a rally for higher wages with Bernie Sanders in Charleston. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9723?s=20%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Watch this
powerful clip of Rep. Gilliard here.

He was a 2020 campaign co-chair for Bernie and state director in South
Carolina, and like Bernie, he has been a powerful champion of working
people for decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

US Rep. Ro Khanna has also joined us in campaigning for Wendell Gilliard
who’s been a union leader, a Charleston City Councilor, and a fighter in
the SC House for good-paying jobs, neighborhood safety, and criminal
justice reform.

“We need a voice not afraid to speak truth to power,” Wendell said. “They
want this seat so they can keep power in Columbia and not in your hands.
They want to control the money, jobs, and opportunities.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Wendell is an incredible movement ally and he’s in a tight race
against the corporate wing of the party. We can pull this out with your
help — donate now to GOTV in South Carolina!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Our Revolution is excited to endorse Jovanka Beckles for California State
Senate in 2024!

We backed Jovanka in her successful runs for Richmond City Council, and
she’s been twice backed by Bernie Sanders — including in 2014 when she
took on Chevron for polluting her community and WON!

As a city counselor, she was able to increase the minimum wage, pass rent
control, pass Ban the Box, and support local labor unions. As a member of
Teamsters Local 856, Jovanka can be found on picket lines at a moment’s
notice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

“These were progressive policies that I continued to push for even after
being told they would be impossible to do on the local level,” Jovanka
said on a recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9724?si=GbZR4hu3LehaT2PB%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1029&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Our Revolution broadcast.

Jovanka would be the first black candidate to represent this district in
nearly 40 years. She brings lived experience as a Black, Queer, immigrant,
Latinx woman and a voice that is needed in state government.

“I’m running because we need bold leadership who will be courageous on
climate, healthcare, criminal justice reform, housing, taxing the rich,
women’s and worker’s rights,” she said. “I’m proud to be part of this
movement for change, for a society that puts people over profit.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Jovanka_Beckles_ptv_copy/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1030&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Our Revolution organizers are already getting started ahead of the March
primary! Help us build a winning grassroots team now to make sure we’re
ready to get Jovanka to victory as the next State Senator in California!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Jovanka_Beckles_ptv_copy/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]JOIN OUR ORGANIZING TEAM FOR JOVANKA BECKLES

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

We took a survey, and it’s clear that Our Revolution members in California
want political leaders who will stand up and fight against Big Oil, Big
Pharma, and Wall Street.

Members chose their top 3 issues heading into 2024, and Climate and
Healthcare topped the priorities of nearly three-quarters of respondents.
About half ranked defending democracy and affordable housing as their top
choices.

Members are motivated to pass CalCare to create a single-payer system in
the state, and they want to stop an effort funded by Big Oil to try to
repeal SB 1137 — which prohibits new oil/gas wells within 3,200 feet of
homes, schools, nursing homes, and hospitals.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1033&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1034&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

MARYLAND — Councilmembers Will Jawando and Kristin Mink joined us for
Server-for-a-Day in Ocean City last week, where they served up food to
promote legislation to raise the wage — and not leave tipped workers
behind!

“It was a great experience and it was fun, but it’s also hard work. I
think this demonstrates why we need to do it,” Councilman Jawando told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9725?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1035&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Maryland Matters.

The event included Our Revolution, One Fair Wage, and our coalition of
worker activists and other state/local elected officials at On the Bay
Seafood — a ‘high-road’ restaurant that pays its servers the full minimum
wage.

Organizers and workers fought and won a $15 minimum wage that goes into
effect on Jan. 1st in Montgomery and Howard counties, but the tipped wage
is still $3.63.

Last month Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us for a similar event in Chicago,
and if you’re in Ohio, RSVP now to join us this week with Mayor Aftab
Purval in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9718?start=1%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1036&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Cincinnati and Mayor Justin Bibb in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9717?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1037&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Cleveland for
Server-for-a-Day events!

Stay tuned! In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing for
signatures for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE directly
on the ballot in 2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9692?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

Ahead of Labor Day, anti-worker Republicans are pulling out all the stops
to block the Senate from reconfirming worker champion Gwynne Wilcox to the
National Labor Relations Board — but we’re taking action!

It’s a hot labor summer and America’s workers need help from the NLRB
right now. Hollywood writers and actors are on strike. United Auto Workers
have authorized a strike. And, new unions like Starbucks Workers United
and Amazon Labor Union are facing off against some of the most aggressive
illegal union busting in history.

If Republicans stop Wilcox from being reconfirmed, the NLRB will not have
enough members to make decisions. That means it will be unable to step in
and protect striking workers from corporate wrongdoing and illegal union
busting.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9692?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Tell Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer to schedule a vote and make
sure Senators like Joe Manchin and Krysten Sinema VOTE YES to reconfirm
Gwynne Wilcox to the NLRB now!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1041&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.dIWBbN&t=1008&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.u-trXt&t=1009&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230902_NL_RevReport_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.W3GJ7M&t=1010&akid=4626%2E5885482%2EgA_voS ]GIVE ONCE

A quarter said they plan to vote for someone other than Joe Biden in the Democratic Primaries. In our online Dem Primary Poll, 44% said they are likely to vote for Biden, 41% said they are likely to vote for another candidate, and 7.6% not likely to vote. Meanwhile, despite Democrats pointing out all the horrors of Trump, national polls show him tied with or beating Biden in 2024. Democrats have a problem: The base is not excited about a Trump/Biden rematch and tacking to the right is crushing enthusiasm among key voting blocs. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS" | | "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE" Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b39160b2e15d428c9a01e07f33445aca&_e=kAF-yQ3eCJkOUj5uKckcu-5ZzVsbEBL4MU7_iDZO0qn6xPIMxtpxAkBZJaoEiY_DqO7wh23YtcHuUESp9xZZrso8m8C7XdiDdZdJmgTKlIF5gYGe6toFq54BQPUMvyVrjZKcnrETpd3rC3jiEe4xHRRqcqZyArAcrBMQPHxCbER8SOtumAGEc9VQ0R2I_Ef_zyiLFu-npKisVWi98p8j0T99DVc06golB3fv4R0Z0T2SEYXCtDFaL6nEPELfKTYvwB_SEcaA90PesHobXEmTfI8XkE6ZUnmhRLrK43ymxzBZg5tnZ5jbpiqE-YRI2QWU7Ja8BL2rZ_u2IMfkXjUNKRdibV0zCtFNir4odDd2Y2OCHacOvo7cM2XZQBVVDGK7Ofv5i8guXzZMXqT2HEGEgiwKqpBdSz18g1ZjKc-G45w%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b39160b2e15d428c9a01e07f33445aca&_e=kAF-yQ3eCJkOUj5uKckcu-5ZzVsbEBL4MU7_iDZO0qn6xPIMxtpxAkBZJaoEiY_DqO7wh23YtcHuUESp9xZZrso8m8C7XdiDdZdJmgTKlIF5gYGe6toFq54BQPUMvyVrjZKcnrETpd3rC3jiEe4xHRRqcqZyArAcrBMQPHxCbER8SOtumAGEc9VQ0R2I_Ef_zyiLFu-npKisVWi98p8j0T99DVc06golB3fv4R0Z0T2SEYXCtDFaL6nEPELfKTYvwB_SEcaA90PesHobXEmTfBFVoF4jQVfzfYfPS4KcC0LZMq1zn3AFlyUdcJogL1050N2aS_zXPbFLfWdurGYvEFxTAb9a0O4agWvNwIzgU5SgUab-76w092vS5g4z2UazIm1_Zbv5pectHDSljM4bX3IGBVtItghmcDOiM_eMoEA%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b39160b2e15d428c9a01e07f33445aca&_e=kAF-yQ3eCJkOUj5uKckcu-5ZzVsbEBL4MU7_iDZO0qn6xPIMxtpxAkBZJaoEiY_DqO7wh23YtcHuUESp9xZZrso8m8C7XdiDdZdJmgTKlIF5gYGe6toFq54BQPUMvyVrjZKcnrETpd3rC3jiEe4xHRRqcqZyArAcrBMQPHxCbER8SOtumAGEc9VQ0R2I_Ef_zyiLFu-npKisVWi98p8j0T99DVc06golB3fv4R0Z0T2SEYXCtDFaL6nEPELfKTYvwB_SEcaA90PesHobXEmTfLdXhvGE6c1aFRITWLv3ZrNsMYOVFKTGh9wjUxQLwbz4ADvXqSrKxTPYvr-kvUUt7vslkcFBclv16MuyXtkhXUGnbh70_1jukxXHrCsypUW9Xy9ohDIK1TQH6bMYfb0X8QCmI71eMufOZut_5P899Dk%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b39160b2e15d428c9a01e07f33445aca&_e=kAF-yQ3eCJkOUj5uKckcu-5ZzVsbEBL4MU7_iDZO0qn6xPIMxtpxAkBZJaoEiY_DqO7wh23YtcHuUESp9xZZrso8m8C7XdiDdZdJmgTKlIF5gYGe6toFq54BQPUMvyVrjZKcnrETpd3rC3jiEe4xHRRqcqZyArAcrBMQPHxCbER8SOtumAGEc9VQ0R2I_Ef_zyiLFu-npKisVWi98p8j0T99DVc06golB3fv4R0Z0T2SEYXCtDFaL6nEPELfKTYvwB_SEcaA90PesHobXEmTfDWtOaNa2h0L5kdhRrjvsyPcT4DPkIETdSxjNVXEIDTcD5TySY4qbPNvJ-D8GJcBdmLif_sDFIvIbWd8H9NQDB704YN7UJsrZzLRv0vpVoYzBKJxKjxbwwUTY2_5FnBR66Oy6IT2BeRFL5b2Ix4a6ws%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b39160b2e15d428c9a01e07f33445aca&_e=kAF-yQ3eCJkOUj5uKckcu-5ZzVsbEBL4MU7_iDZO0qn6xPIMxtpxAkBZJaoEiY_DqO7wh23YtcHuUESp9xZZrso8m8C7XdiDdZdJmgTKlIF5gYGe6toFq54BQPUMvyVrjZKcnrETpd3rC3jiEe4xHRRqcqZyArAcrBMQPHxCbER8SOtumAGEc9VQ0R2I_Ef_zyiLFu-npKisVWi98p8j0T99DVc06golB3fv4R0Z0T2SEYXCtDFaL6nEPELfKTYvwB_SEcaA90PesHobXEmTfLGWERx-vYSyA4fstb4ZCpN5wn0scG_FxcK6y2AmGzIHIMax-3c31zrAeDLI1xpu1BbqcErwL4rEPXXgMZS6jEqmJ_TbMvRduyPpr1CPIVcMkuEN-w_9BI5RJeKuTuwE3IvaZJB1lK0enZCnG90BUTk%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Endorse “What’s Next” for Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Friend, Michigan has always been a place where dreams come to life. We’ve got grit. We’re tough. **And we are always focused on what’s next.** Earlier this week, I gave my “What’s Next” Address to the state — where I outlined our priorities for the fall. I need your help to get it done. **[If you’re ready to help us continue winning for Michiganders across the state, endorse our plan to keep making a difference and creating opportunities for all>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69095915/425091944/-554420346?contactdata=ae8QYzMZ3QFYDhKYj9ihBoMS7sYnN7Afhci7kbGJDq83T6gEIErGyg5Lc/bGtp26vimASCCfzoL8FWjeTWrbi7Wdh/mfpYPxPdgKCJKoqyGrkfrxrvDhWSYj8TPgWfpdcuxPsOKK32YK+zKfAypJgA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWExMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EhtIPxNLnM9pLPr4EATzU4yX1nKsJi-fvXm-xMugyqM=&emci=a850a0b6-0849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69095916/425091945/-554420346?contactdata=ae8QYzMZ3QFYDhKYj9ihBoMS7sYnN7Afhci7kbGJDq83T6gEIErGyg5Lc/bGtp26vimASCCfzoL8FWjeTWrbi7Wdh/mfpYPxPdgKCJKoqyGrkfrxrvDhWSYj8TPgWfpdcuxPsOKK32YK+zKfAypJgA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWExMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EhtIPxNLnM9pLPr4EATzU4yX1nKsJi-fvXm-xMugyqM=&emci=a850a0b6-0849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)
---
Before I get into what’s next, let’s take a look at what we’ve accomplished together. Thanks to the Democratic majority in Lansing, we’ve transformed our state. We’ve:
* Repealed the 1931 ban on abortion
* Passed commonsense gun laws in the wake of horrific mass shootings
* Lowered costs for families by boosting tax credits and repealing the retirement tax
* Expanded workers’ rights
* Signed the _CROWN Act_
* Enacted the ‘Make it in Michigan’ Budget
* Won free meals for all students

As Governor, it's my mission to ensure that we’re cared for. Because all Michiganders, regardless of their background, where they live, or where they’re from, should have the opportunity to thrive.
**That’s why my fall priorities are grounded in the core principle of health:** the health of our people, the health of the planet, the health of our economy, and the health of our democracy. Here’s what that means:
_**For our people**_
Despite an overwhelming grassroots movement that voted to protect abortion rights in the state constitution, there are still many bad laws that put politically motivated, medically unnecessary restrictions on abortion. That’s why a key provision of my plan for what’s next is to **pass the _Reproductive Health Act_** to roll back harmful restrictions and protect the freedom for Michiganders to make our own decisions without interference from politicians.
_**For our planet**_
Michigan truly is the most beautiful state in the country, and to protect our clean air, land, and water, we must face climate change head-on and grow our economy. To get that done, we need to get bold and **bring a 100% clean energy standard to Michigan** so our children’s children and grandchildren can breathe clean air and drink clean water.
_**For our economy**_
We do not need to accept a choice that far too many Michiganders are forced to make: to earn a paycheck or spend time with their newborn, recover from a health issue, or care for an aging or sick parent or spouse. So we’re going to **enact paid family and medical leave,** so that we can care for our families without sacrificing our ability to pay the bills.
_**For our democracy**_
By passing Proposal 2 last November and making it easier to vote, Michiganders sent a clear message that we won’t tolerate threats against the integrity of our elections. But these threats continue to exist, so we need to **shore up election security** and ensure every voter is heard and respected.
**[I believe we can build a healthier, stronger, and more prosperous Michigan together. If you’re with me and you’re just as excited as I am about what’s next for Michigan, please add your name to endorse our priorities today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69095917/425091946/-554420346?contactdata=ae8QYzMZ3QFYDhKYj9ihBoMS7sYnN7Afhci7kbGJDq83T6gEIErGyg5Lc/bGtp26vimASCCfzoL8FWjeTWrbi7Wdh/mfpYPxPdgKCJKoqyGrkfrxrvDhWSYj8TPgWfpdcuxPsOKK32YK+zKfAypJgA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWExMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EhtIPxNLnM9pLPr4EATzU4yX1nKsJi-fvXm-xMugyqM=&emci=a850a0b6-0849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69095919/425091947/-554420346?contactdata=ae8QYzMZ3QFYDhKYj9ihBoMS7sYnN7Afhci7kbGJDq83T6gEIErGyg5Lc/bGtp26vimASCCfzoL8FWjeTWrbi7Wdh/mfpYPxPdgKCJKoqyGrkfrxrvDhWSYj8TPgWfpdcuxPsOKK32YK+zKfAypJgA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWExMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EhtIPxNLnM9pLPr4EATzU4yX1nKsJi-fvXm-xMugyqM=&emci=a850a0b6-0849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)

Our list of accomplishments is growing, now let’s keep it going.

name: David Hogg
subject: regarding an assault weapons ban
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

| Peter,

It’s David Hogg. A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

I’m all too familiar with the deadly effects of assault-style weapons. It’s the same type of weapon that a former classmate used when he entered my school, Marjory Stoneman Douglas, and killed my classmates.

_No one, especially not teenagers, should be able to access assault weapons._

**These weapons of war don’t belong in our schools or on our streets.

[_That’s why I’m joining Stop Gun Violence PAC and Leaders We Deserve in calling for Congress to immediately pass an assault weapons ban. Will you add your name to our petition and join us?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69096041/425092083/-1109123357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTYxMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxqTAhEx1nxeW_G37Cb4lmSurZ2rMcvt5Ir0fvhmLmY=&emci=492a17fb-3e48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e6118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)**

**Parkland, Uvalde, Sandy Hook ... the list goes on._All these mass shootings were carried out using high-capacity AR-15-style assault weapons._**

These deadly weapons were designed for combat and increase the deadliness of mass shooting events.

That’s why we must do everything in our power to work against the NRA and gun lobby to ensure that these deadly weapons stay off our streets.

[_**Will you join me and sign this petition to demand Congress take action and pass an assault weapons ban?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69096043/425092085/-1109123357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTYxMThlMzYtOWQ0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxqTAhEx1nxeW_G37Cb4lmSurZ2rMcvt5Ir0fvhmLmY=&emci=492a17fb-3e48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e6118e36-9d49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

clean_body: A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage. | Peter, It’s David Hogg. A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage. I’m all too familiar with the deadly effects of assault-style weapons. It’s the same type of weapon that a former classmate used when he entered my school, Marjory Stoneman Douglas, and killed my classmates. No one, especially not teenagers, should be able to access assault weapons. These weapons of war don’t belong in our schools or on our streets. | Parkland, Uvalde, Sandy Hook ... the list goes on.All these mass shootings were carried out using high-capacity AR-15-style assault weapons. These deadly weapons were designed for combat and increase the deadliness of mass shooting events. That’s why we must do everything in our power to work against the NRA and gun lobby to ensure that these deadly weapons stay off our streets. | Thank you for your support, David Hogg = * | | = PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 17 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Sep 1, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania -
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewSeptember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230902-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11807%2E9716520%2EQxPWIM)
---

Thank you

\- James

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: “NOT GUILTY”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have WAIVED my arraignment. . .
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHsMdjkwKG7bg5N1UN72NVeIsczJJNiQ8E0yr-viLK9fu9p9D6Nj9PA_b0T9kUAXBgXASD0FwFwqF_ef5jD28GVp6-2LZ1p6tuWwqsAyPeJ_lefVyqKnoeNWldgB6GFEArqlNlpY4xWqrh0ulEKdNNaaYLdoe-xxV56dSLagVJtwR1I0HInQdWN0qbCWqI9oZbegkZfi1reOFU4Jj_gNc9rnKowxmLoLjlPy2PSXsB-obDOVN04zYRbY2P-L5U-0szBl9eRUy77NeHseeF0LsMYI-dMJGCfwgCmt74nRVLqlhov9H7N8RgJeY1Cu6ev2eAyrnMgoV3go3-y4OPk-ZyEdp9On8mYMqUstFMSpBRgjmlgFNr9eX3_9nb4-et6f8DHS7T7aL9_rG39G4u5w-nGw8CLsaKW523CJvcvAAD__yOPjTk)
---
Friend,
A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch.
The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail.
_But I refuse to play into the Left’s hands._
That’s why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded **“NOT GUILTY”** to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt...
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ9m2IHM2NiwYNFbN5Waqosu-nM3kWMPyaTYIDCN7ttXRLndfudodD6Ni_PIw1sP5gUQrxxWQAT5ARCP6uXXN338ebTl-ZNpS6sbdd9T_AiI-W2m_9XnlYqi43GnxhahR9-i9wX1te6k1lrWdXHtVeebxjVoVBhaE7xGpXR7rgdHne8UFtyjQCk6gbVqaqmroEQw5yCFMyiDU6DEnVMVpuTGcMvLFufKT7EY-2vO8_qYdAA8rOS3hao7p4XC3tiZ-0uli7Swd-Vt4pTLYUthcbxyupR-ipFzJgI8JD-iHowbqCYhZEuNA3nYcjxFCrxFkPbpq3e4TtviCaT1fHJP5l2cHV8SSPvu9J5MKVPKIG0tUAhAfUojB5D283f5Iw9fft_mB3y8RNrX9uvr1qo_oVj6MN95HHnVBpS47BN2uX8BAAD__0GhjUc)
---
**_Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV?_**
Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses.
We have _serious_ matters to deal with – not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices.

clean_body: I have WAIVED my arraignment. . . | | | Friend, A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch. The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail. But I refuse to play into the Left’s hands. That’s why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded “NOT GUILTY” to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt... | Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV? Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses. We have serious matters to deal with – not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices. I’m going to focus on the REAL ISSUES that matter to Americans. And that’s how we’re going to win back the White House in 2024 and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sad state of our country right now, then don’t even think about donating! | Thank you, | Donald J. _With the Left making plans to convert a local nursing home into a migrant shelter, New Yorkers have stood up and decided enough is enough; migrants CANNOT take priority over the people of New York._

Nicole explained that **"They're very frustrated, because [they 're] being subjected to these backwards policies of prioritizing illegal immigrants over tax paying citizens, so yesterday there was a peaceful protest. Arrests were made at the direction of the mayor, obviously. ****And it's frustrating, because, you know, the summer of 2020, we had rioters who assaulted police officers, who looted, who created all sorts of disruption, and all their charges were dropped. So I'm calling for equal treatment."**

**"These individuals did nothing wrong, okay. They walked into the streets, and they were arrested,"** Malliotakis said. **"So I am calling for those charges to be dropped, but more importantly, I'm calling for the mayor, the president, to listen to what their citizens are actually telling them. This is unsustainable."**

As the representative for New York’s 11th Congressional District, Nicole is focused on government accountability and transparency, supporting law enforcement, securing our nation’s borders and combating the spread of socialism. | | | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 View our privacy policy **

Team — I know it's Labor Day weekend, and you're probably enjoying some well-deserved rest time. But I just couldn't wait to give you a HUGE thank you. We not only hit our August fundraising goal, but we kicked off the first full month of this campaign on the right foot. I am humbled to see so many grassroots supporters — from New York to your community— join our movement to flip this seat blue next year. But our journey has just begun. This month will be a major test for us as we near our first quarterly deadline of the campaign at the end of September. It’s a pretty big deal. See, a few days after we close the books on September, our fundraising numbers will be publicly reported. **This is the moment when voters, election forecasters, and the Republican Party will gauge the strength of our grassroots movement.** **_[That’s why it’s go big or go home for us, friend. My team set an ambitious $45,000 grassroots fundraising goal for September, and I am counting on your help to crush it. Will you rush a donation of any amount to help us report strong numbers at the end of this quarter? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69098168/425099371/1307642733?refcode=ea.5a0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5a0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTBjOWM2NS1hMTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0HffritIPDsZ99w4cKxLx1vl2CboLQGgJDjuKWXY6s=)_** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69098169/425099372/1307642733?refcode=ea.5a0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5a0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTBjOWM2NS1hMTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0HffritIPDsZ99w4cKxLx1vl2CboLQGgJDjuKWXY6s=)

There’s no question he's going to bring in a huge haul of corporate money and cash from the GOP's and Trump's biggest donors. **I'm rejecting all of that.**
Instead, we're powering this campaign with the people — a movement full of working Americans who are ready to win one of the country’s most competitive toss-up races and help Democrats take back the House majority.
That’s why it’s critical to come out swinging and show pundits, our opponents, and allies that we have what it takes to win. **We simply can’t afford to fall short of our goal, team.**

name: Rose Huerta
subject: Not the news I wanted to deliver
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
But there is an upside!

I’ll come right out and say it, Peter: Team Wilson fell short of its end-of-month fundraising goal. To be honest, this isn’t the news I wanted to deliver today. Falling short of these goals usually means cutting campaign expenses across the board, which is _not_ what we want to do with voters heading to the polls in just a few weeks. **But there is some good news:** We still have a chance to make up some lost ground before our huge filing deadline on Monday. If we can close the gap and hit our targets for the next three days, we’ll be right back on track heading into the final weeks of the primary! And look, I know we’ve asked for a lot of support lately, but we wouldn’t ask if we didn’t have to. Shawn is running a campaign for working Louisianans, and that’s exactly who he’s counting on to help him hit these campaign goals and win this high-stakes governor’s race. **_[We understand if you weren’t able to chip in before last month’s deadline, but we need your help now more than ever before. Please, chip in anything that works for you to help us get back on track!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69098184/425099389/218720461?refcode=ea.5f0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5f0c9c65-a149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWYwYzljNjUtYTE0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eGvHnGs0D-7unYXxifFsg52DLTQofbK-8ASWt4k8qgs=)_** clean_body: But there is an upside! I’ll come right out and say it, Peter: Team Wilson fell short of its end-of-month fundraising goal. To be honest, this isn’t the news I wanted to deliver today. Falling short of these goals usually means cutting campaign expenses across the board, which is not what we want to do with voters heading to the polls in just a few weeks. But there is some good news: We still have a chance to make up some lost ground before our huge filing deadline on Monday. If we can close the gap and hit our targets for the next three days, we’ll be right back on track heading into the final weeks of the primary! And look, I know we’ve asked for a lot of support lately, but we wouldn’t ask if we didn’t have to. Shawn is running a campaign for working Louisianans, and that’s exactly who he’s counting on to help him hit these campaign goals and win this high-stakes governor’s race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much, Rose Huerta Finance Director, Wilson for Louisiana = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: [LAST CHANCE] - VPP
subject: re: George Santos' resignation?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__But we couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=6&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=7&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52354?t=8&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=9&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=10&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=11&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52353?t=12&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10272%2E878179%2Ex12u5A)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Do you endorse my plan to make judges follow a code of ethics in order to sit on the bench?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
My plan will root out corruption and restore public trust in the federal judiciary

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=36%2E4032634%2Ex9hc6T)
---
Public trust in the Supreme Court was already at historic lows — and I wouldn’t be surprised if it just keeps getting worse from here. We keep learning more and more about how Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury travel gifts from billionaires like GOP megadonor Harlan Crow — full of private jets, superyachts, and exclusive resorts. Look, when someone gets their day in court, they shouldn’t have to wonder whether their judge — or a Supreme Court justice — is looking out for wealthy donors instead of the rule of law. **This latest revelations are just a reminder that the judicial branch needs real ethics reform, from top to bottom. I’ve got a plan for that — the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act.** >From banning federal judges from owning individual stocks to overhauling the broken judicial recusal process, this bill would help root out corruption and restore public trust in the federal judiciary. But we have to fight side by side — as a grassroots movement — to get these reforms through Congress. [**I’ll keep fighting to root corruption out of our federal judiciary, and I need you in this fight with me. Please let me know: Do you endorse my plan to make judges follow a basic, binding code of ethics in order to sit on the bench?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16G_JUD_E_20230902_V1S1_AK_F12&t=8&akid=36%2E4032634%2Ex9hc6T) | [**YES**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16G_JUD_E_20230902_V1S1_AK_F12&t=9&akid=36%2E4032634%2Ex9hc6T)
---
Simply put, corruption is toxic to our democracy. Here are a few big pieces of how this bill would give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest:
* Banning federal judges from owning individual stocks and certain other investments.
* Strengthening restrictions on judicial gifts and privately funded travel.
* Imposing the existing Code of Conduct for U.S. Judges on the Supreme Court — the only court in the country not currently subject to a binding ethical code.
* Improving disclosure of judicial speeches and case assignments, while mandating the livestreaming of court proceedings.
* Closing the loophole that allows judges to escape accountability by retiring from the bench, strengthening disciplinary authority for the Judicial Conference, setting up expedited impeachment procedures for federal judges, and allowing the public to file complaints against Supreme Court Justices — like all other federal judges — through a new Supreme Court Complaints Review Committee.
* Limiting the ability of courts to seal records that contain important information for the protection of public health or safety, often concealed at the urging of massive corporations.

Beyond this bill, there’s more we can do to restore faith in an independent judiciary committed to the rule of law. I’ve been pushing to expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats to rebalance this institution that’s been hijacked by right-wing extremists. But let’s make progress by tackling corruption.
There’s real momentum behind the judicial ethics reform. But now we need to show that the American people are raising their voices on this.
[**Will you let me know if you endorse our Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act? Make your voice heard on this issue that is powerfully important to our democracy.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16G_JUD_E_20230902_V1S1_AK_F12&t=10&akid=36%2E4032634%2Ex9hc6T)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
P.S. Do you have any feedback on this plan or for our campaign in general? [**Please share with me here. I appreciate hearing your thoughts.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-share-your-feedback/?source=EMZ16G_JUD_E_20230902_V1S1_AK_F12&t=11&akid=36%2E4032634%2Ex9hc6T)

Peter,

It’s clear that Nikki’s message is resonating with voters across the country. America is ready for a new generation of leadership, and Nikki is the best candidate for the job!

This week Nikki’s post-debate momentum continued with a standing-room only town hall, ground breaking fundraising numbers, and a steady flow of positive reviews about Nikki’s toughness and candor.

Check out the highlights:

INDIAN LAND, SC: TOWN HALL

Nikki held her first event, post-debate, in her home state of South Carolina where she was joined by Congressman Ralph Norman. The FLOOD of support from over 1,000 voters at this event was incredible. The crowd was so big, Nikki stopped by not one, not two, but three overflow rooms to greet voters!

Watch the recap below. →

Support for Haley on the rise in SC following strong showing in first Republican debate

“South Carolina’s Nikki Haley racked up support for her 2024 presidential bid as she rode the high of her first presidential primary debate performance before a large crowd in her home state.

Following an uptick in her campaign after her widely lauded debate performance last Wednesday, Haley attracted more than a thousand potential voters during a town hall at the CrossRidge Center in Indian Land on Monday. In the largest crowd the venue has seen, the former S.C. governor touted her record on immigration and national security while gliding on the tenacity some voters say has landed them firmly in her corner.

“I’ve been on the fence about Nikki for a long time, but the debate the other night brought me over to her side,” said Jude Sowell, 68, an Independent who traveled from Charlotte for the event. “She showed some real backbone, and that’s something I had not seen from her in the last couple of years, but I thought she really had the best performance among any of those guys.”

More About Nikki Haley

https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=373ae755c6518b1976e102aac54bc5678adb68fb57d61fb41473d5d462a3d47415fc2d9043c2181c140441baf7b9f8de5f593a1fc52360878dec12ccaa8fc804

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.
I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

I’m running for President because we have a country to save!

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President.

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m done watching Republicans lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=710164cc9404e002fc546730ca5e5ca52233a4966e3836eed0efd6593d9da48901dffca60b9faf46a71224dba94abebc3ceae27927b7256413db9e9c0c150d645bddcbd1a4fe1a92fd6f59a113b492af

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=03ef2243d37102b0c067c5a2212dc19ee0e88ac207bc5d18b8630235ef26d8991d3dc133b5723f6588720cde1c6383987e9d0cb8a5764fb4615516e738d42b32

Peter,

The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. The second GOP debate is our opportunity to reach millions of voters who can join our movement and build a better future for this country.

Talk is ineffective, and that’s why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. I will make this clear on the debate stage September 27th.

As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I’ve done that in Florida, and I’ve watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to show the nation that leadership.

I debate and defend what I KNOW is right—even when it goes against the grain of the approved elite media narrative.

The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what’s right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all.

I am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it’s time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:

-
Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

-
STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

-
DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. This is a race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I am asking for your continued support.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=03ef2243d37102b04a5cbd097be053927e2f63d4a5b32dd86b9c4a0ddac13bc65cd18c53c44338378e3321b9b120171abc22d4c63073762d006017b44cd76d0a

PITCH IN $47

PITCH IN $200

The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN.

I am humbly asking for your support today, Peter.

Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.
