Ron DeSantis

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=24585b2113993083f80f4758ed47f0164b1274166421ab689a7620d6a94d999fb918f4f1798fbcf26c09c7995add8c191822061100b7d819fb8b2bbf6abc964d
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=03ef2243d37102b0c067c5a2212dc19ee0e88ac207bc5d18b8630235ef26d8991d3dc133b5723f6588720cde1c6383987e9d0cb8a5764fb4615516e738d42b32

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Hey there, happy Saturday!
I'm busy traveling across the district to earn folks' votes, but I’m taking a break to send you all a quick message:
There are only three days until the primary election, and we really need the resources to reach Rhode Islanders before they head to the polls.
EVERY dollar we raise right now is put to work immediately, turning out each and every last voter. It’s what we do in these final days – in these final hours – that’ll get us over the finish line, and I need your help. Will you rush a donation right now? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q32023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.09.02_B1_GOTV_30o [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q32023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.09.02_B1_GOTV_30o]

clean_body: [] Hey there, happy Saturday! I'm busy traveling across the district to earn folks' votes, but I’m taking a break to send you all a quick message: There are only three days until the primary election, and we really need the resources to reach Rhode Islanders before they head to the polls. EVERY dollar we raise right now is put to work immediately, turning out each and every last voter. It’s what we do in these final days – in these final hours – that’ll get us over the finish line, and I need your help. Will you rush a donation right now? [] Thanks for your support! – Sabina Sent from my iPhone [] [] Paid for and Authorized by Sabina for Rhode Island Sabina for Rhode Island P.O Box 40715 Providence, RI 02940 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis took her turn in the spotlight by becoming the latest Democrat prosecutor to indict Donald Trump | | | Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis took her turn in the spotlight by becoming the latest Democrat prosecutor to indict Donald Trump. Democrat prosecutors are lining up to charge Trump as part of an all-out crusade to prevent Trump from winning back the White House. But Fani Willis has a dirty secret that could get the charges against Trump dropped. name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for
body:
Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate,
you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have
to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been
with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing
about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate
kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to
take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey
I have been on. Once you've finished reading this, please
consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my
campaign momentum STRONG!

Ever since I launched my
campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described
in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY
words.

I am the daughter of legal immigrants from
a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian
family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to
this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were,
what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day,
the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to
see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the
same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares
transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to
embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better
than the one before it.

After
graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I
decided to take a job working for my family's business that my
mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was
frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how
easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these
frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was:
"Don't complain. Do something about it."

So, that's exactly what I did and I decided
to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against
the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I
had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before
the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on
me, and we won.

It was an honor
to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the
status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I
fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure
important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated.
They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for
governor.

When I
campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was
polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I
was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together,
we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in
South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and
revitalizing our economy.

When I was
nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I
didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to
the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world
that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those
who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators,
murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

I launched my
campaign for President over six months ago because our country is
heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We
need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and
prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just
completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep
the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message
across America! It would mean a lot to me if every single person
reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the
strength of my campaign post-debate. >>

Your donation
will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned
with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our
campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you
consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in
support of my fight to save America?

CHIP IN $5

CHIP IN $25

CHIP IN $50

CHIP IN $150

CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT

Friend,
throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm
hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get
there, I need your help to make it across the finish line -
starting right now.

Your support is
what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with
me.

My very best,

Nikki Haley

Paid for by Team Stand for
America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of
Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund
Inc.

www.TeamStandForAmerica.com

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign Now: Tell Republicans we will NOT raise the Social Security retirement age!

body:
Before Social Security, 50% of seniors lived in poverty. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3c-ea7G3UtK03wNI0Ge-4Bt45ZvncMS3hXE5F7TzwVB5hxnrn75CRSMIWeM2B_L6vpdNLXi0I4Bd3j1pacrzAJK35h3tIaba2a6ZvaZ0bGtP1ZupfrXn0Cn4DoFvfkYOIC2b5rYdgtW3f68V8UxvUI2pDe24SdcuaizM9_Rvcy6KcFihy0GRfvSZzsSbwppBjzob53T6H3cWm68xzDnk5UbdT9t1Um00hEB54-iBowmv3KCsZTBrsltFdomVYR7wX2r_vr3Dw2JgUVLA5tBPrg/3z9/q75DCceISmqe4vjrRfVW1Q/h0/BlgiZRdnN760o_P2QIJVEeMX2Zdye3yBlgM4lW-urhg)
---
Friend, Republicans want us to work until we die. Life expectancy in the U.S. has decreased in recent years, impacting communities of color the most. Black and Indigenous folks now have life expectancies that range from just 65 – 70 years old.1 The Social Security retirement age has already been raised to 67 years old. And now, many Republicans want to raise it even higher. They claim the only way to “save” Social Security is to cut benefits. But raising the retirement age would result in millions of people never collecting a dime of their hard-earned benefits. **The true solution to protecting the future of Social Security is making high-income earners pay their fair share.** That’s why I’m proud to support Sen. Bernie Sanders’s _Social Security Expansion Act_ , which expands Social Security benefits by $2,400 a year and ensures the trust fund is fully funded for the next 75 years. [**This Labor Day weekend, let’s fight for the rights of working people to be able to retire in dignity and not have to work until they die. Sign now to tell Republicans: We will NOT raise the Social Security retirement age!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7TnqlAT39uH3jvSIXkn0TFS2wLxMpWkjSrSVSbD0Mng5Vztz0nMiBImUyBW6suRZsRzGv_Iconfa0Af5OU30hAyis4uH4vkL2Zr7GLYdLrgsttzq7abryN9JHZX4vs3LFrMECx0SiniP7zVb2krtPRG43ORED1ekrfBFFs4EaL9NuBMXQu9GufvPPLwyjw75o4zgE98GtpN9TKSkSyWE68xH6brEyRM1gz_Ekz52sQYTRNXMjAnb-Ugeu803qX2bjTvPy9mTpdRrNiND6ydeicarKdg0iCxo-KCwwqvSZs5O6nDjWd4MG_K_7n3iYbxWDjAzvMtb7QCb4_CGssxM3RMV_ze2Fe-EYNi0o2zfho1B01yz0EM9dxNTs1bDLwrMgHW9ewEAhBjXwFuqn9IvdPlEPcIWq9To1Y36ROn-u_wlkL0Y5xotkpQW_3SPyQIJFI76TJUejVycH9plwDFFbdEYEZF4bo-gp7L-WCYt6xgxK4rH3tsNcNf8_ORaSwwy-ANHU/3z9/q75DCceISmqe4vjrRfVW1Q/h1/hVkHyQu-Dxc-0sJmJQa9F0LZNRJiCnv0_xnYTsZuoQc) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7TnqlAT39uH3jvSIXkn0TFS2wLxMpWkjSrSVSbD0Mng5Vztz0nMiBImUyBW6suRZsRzGv_Iconfa0Af5OU30hAyis4uH4vkL2Zr7GLYdLrgsttzq7abryN9JHZX4vs3LFrMECx0SiniP7zVb2krtPRG43ORED1ekrfBFFs4EaL9NuBMXQu9GufvPPLwyjw75o4zgE98GtpN9TKSkSyWE68xH6brEyRM1gz_Ekz52sQYTRNXCOODJeEySQgtezhbQjRLEVlbiEHszMOE20qiojRfRLqLH83LY7LZWOm4X3T0hHKpMlu_xMP-Cp9W6i-eL0WJwIrpkTwjdn-l0Kbd1L4araITPDgUgN9BAWO1uMYTeXZF_YxY6up5C3gBW1UZ4zLyeylzmx7qKW7yk3DfDkTj4iBcjVhj3Vs0Fbpfh2U7irlLV3qTF7AwMKt8fE97R2DR6130bp3GrGENUIVSJebmJkf8tzIdI09yjHiNBktlhEI21irVm1Kns8AP4pAHv2Q-44/3z9/q75DCceISmqe4vjrRfVW1Q/h2/NWGbAvfmRanmTgtToj1tJMPpk-9e5LF4auUJGG_QLas)

Last month, Social Security turned 88 years old. Before Social Security, 50% of seniors lived in poverty. Today, that number is less than 10%―still too high, but a major improvement for the 50 million seniors who rely on Social Security each year.
Because of its decades of success, Social Security is under constant attack by conservatives and their Wall Street donors who want to get their hands on our hard-earned benefits.
Right-wing plans to raise the retirement age or cut Social Security Administration funding are intended to put up barriers between us and our benefits and undermine confidence in the program.
In my district alone, we have over 178,000 residents over the age of 55. For many, Social Security is their sole source of income, while others are nearing retirement age and will rely on Social Security to help meet their basic needs of food, housing, and utilities.
[**Let’s not make working people work until they die. Sign now to tell Republicans we will not raise the Social Security retirement age!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7TnqlAT39uH3jvSIXkn0TFS2wLxMpWkjSrSVSbD0Mng5Vztz0nMiBImUyBW6suRZsRzGv_Iconfa0Af5OU30hAyis4uH4vkL2Zr7GLYdLrgsttzq7abryN9JHZX4vs3LFrMECx0SiniP7zVb2krtPRG43ORED1ekrfBFFs4EaL9NuBMXQu9GufvPPLwyjw75o4zgE98GtpN9TKSkSyWE68xH6brEyRM1gz_Ekz52sQYTRNXIwxrgFDatoCfe63vgcSVAtwNvTasiL5Hxjqlyn-IB2gHmYOTD573KO995lSogZ1ecMMusHSdMT3GSka2IYN9mWQiNZiEKkBsNMNzimoqUXIJ0LBuvGzUSXBkQrvPArtN7nVHeeyBa-9Sl2U_IwliXWHWawpUkNiJUAsSBWUr3ioMTHVDeY11EK1aXbYr-u7qoc-Tj0Zg1cg9hnU3LO1MoJmJcT82mI_Xit0DEJh_x7Y3aeS3L5vo_uX5t75xGzUOZEuyVwIKDZ1uSm4_75fseg/3z9/q75DCceISmqe4vjrRfVW1Q/h3/LTGQH3eUSuQI81oCIae4XwxqkF42PqTzmKG7Dymzmqw)
Thank you for fighting by my side to protect workers’ rights and expand Social Security for current and future generations.
\- Rashida

clean_body: Before Social Security, 50% of seniors lived in poverty. | | | Friend, Republicans want us to work until we die. Life expectancy in the U.S. has decreased in recent years, impacting communities of color the most. Black and Indigenous folks now have life expectancies that range from just 65 – 70 years old.1 The Social Security retirement age has already been raised to 67 years old. And now, many Republicans want to raise it even higher. They claim the only way to “save” Social Security is to cut benefits. But raising the retirement age would result in millions of people never collecting a dime of their hard-earned benefits. The true solution to protecting the future of Social Security is making high-income earners pay their fair share. That’s why I’m proud to support Sen. Bernie Sanders’s Social Security Expansion Act , which expands Social Security benefits by $2,400 a year and ensures the trust fund is fully funded for the next 75 years. | Last month, Social Security turned 88 years old. Before Social Security, 50% of seniors lived in poverty. Today, that number is less than 10%―still too high, but a major improvement for the 50 million seniors who rely on Social Security each year. Because of its decades of success, Social Security is under constant attack by conservatives and their Wall Street donors who want to get their hands on our hard-earned benefits. Right-wing plans to raise the retirement age or cut Social Security Administration funding are intended to put up barriers between us and our benefits and undermine confidence in the program. In my district alone, we have over 178,000 residents over the age of 55. For many, Social Security is their sole source of income, while others are nearing retirement age and will rely on Social Security to help meet their basic needs of food, housing, and utilities. Thank you for fighting by my side to protect workers’ rights and expand Social Security for current and future generations. \- Rashida 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

Fellow American,

I've said this since day one: this campaign is built from the bottom up. It's built by a grassroots network of conservative patriots who want to see REAL change in America.

It's important for me to hear directly from top supporters like you, so I've asked our team to set up a special event - _**a chance to meet me for dinner in Charleston, South Carolina.**_

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=adc9e56a8ffc41e39d920a7008c8b21c&_e=va4KL8G5KljVBvi45847gIO55iMbczIuFc7btJeaFUZ7P0KTj7zND7VsjZ7iHWDYieNIfDbJ7huhwYH-TuUeMTgHsSe1mbCwm_nORpKBRgy0Ct6xEoUwpTTCl4NGafzVnz5hdTFx7ABX5KVSNXFoYE-sSgGRYt9AlYdgcfYmQW7mgdGxCZI1Px0AnRfj-rFNim_yLkV-9OmhTb7ApfFFI7YPXaWl0z8cQC0COrKdxK4bAF09Zs1F8EkbsMyJiD8bbls-vy-0cbsTm7ROh2NlU8BK_UIRkS0-jHqisZfXZvfk3FMc_-tS7YTUyOhdZU2FefJ-x6DXX96yDaGzyRtyxBfZSkPWTrTRwdqMGcqxFuGri3EzYZHuPmONPWE5L62wgecg12og9Y6sBM71VyCgqID0VmfmNLL9Qve5LwYkU2k%3D)
I've been busy campaigning all over the country. Next time I'm in South Carolina, I'd like you to be my special guest at dinner.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more to automatically be entered to win a chance to have dinner with me?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=adc9e56a8ffc41e39d920a7008c8b21c&_e=va4KL8G5KljVBvi45847gIO55iMbczIuFc7btJeaFUZ7P0KTj7zND7VsjZ7iHWDYieNIfDbJ7huhwYH-TuUeMTgHsSe1mbCwm_nORpKBRgy0Ct6xEoUwpTTCl4NGafzVnz5hdTFx7ABX5KVSNXFoYE-sSgGRYt9AlYdgcfYmQW7mgdGxCZI1Px0AnRfj-rFNim_yLkV-9OmhTb7ApfFFI7YPXaWl0z8cQC0COrKdxK4bAF09Zs1F8EkbsMyJiD8bbls-vy-0cbsTm7ROh2NlU_UVL5HFesImxYxPlMpt057do4ra78eziYwb9HIVm_O5__DtWrOdv_KrLNBF-0U3iRBEXm9vhomcZXWe5UwAIG0Csukteht2xNzZVwg6-tKCdNfjoDYtkdiZ5j0bdgaf9RZoGfow1Nh_2T5VB_LlvkY%3D)**

We'll take a look at both of our schedules to see what dates work best (I know we're both busy).

At dinner, we can discuss:
1. The top issues facing our country today AND solutions to fix them
2. How to win in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, AND South Carolina
3. What you'd like to see debated at the next GOP Presidential Debate
4. _**And MUCH MORE!**_

There's so much work to do before the second GOP Presidential Debate next month. By chipping in, you'll help me - once again - be center stage.

Thanks for being part of my team. _**I hope to meet you soon!**_

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=adc9e56a8ffc41e39d920a7008c8b21c&_e=va4KL8G5KljVBvi45847gIO55iMbczIuFc7btJeaFUZ7P0KTj7zND7VsjZ7iHWDYieNIfDbJ7huhwYH-TuUeMTgHsSe1mbCwm_nORpKBRgy0Ct6xEoUwpTTCl4NGafzVnz5hdTFx7ABX5KVSNXFoYE-sSgGRYt9AlYdgcfYmQW7mgdGxCZI1Px0AnRfj-rFNim_yLkV-9OmhTb7ApfFFI7YPXaWl0z8cQC0COrKdxK4bAF09Zs1F8EkbsMyJiD8bbls-vy-0cbsTm7ROh2NlU3pPKX45BdHZHNtqaheIt83KQcs7Ekhxw-L2ThgzkdvRcbcf-1OkvpIOm_rumOTPjDVa4GbDFWLXujdpqKPgeVYq86WR5MwdQ-rKDptkmmJDj735w7O2JLpBoZo5ThUdDGFLA52i-IPBE31VHbwyD8k%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

“Redistricting battles could determine control of US House in 2024”**

[**_Fund the fight for fair maps: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69102549/425114879/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230902_FR_9A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMmMwNGRlLWFiNDktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HgG5eabNpngBI-0VbK8L6C7HBCQnA_lEzheGvxtEd0Q=)

**This is huge, team.**

**FIRST:**
Ahead of the 2022 midterm elections, grassroots supporters like you powered the NDRC’s fight to help secure fair maps across the country. In fact, according to the _New York Times_ , last year’s election took place on “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

**THEN:**
Earlier this summer, the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s map for violating the Voting Rights Act, requiring a new, fair map be put in place before the next election.

According to experts, the ruling could impact maps in more states across the country, including Arkansas, Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, Texas, and others.

**NOW:**
With the upcoming redistricting action, there is a real path to the 2024 elections taking place on maps that are _even fairer_ than the maps we helped secure in 2022!

**BUT:**
It will _only_ happen if we stay committed to this fight.

As President Obama reminded us, **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far._We simply cannot afford to do that._ ”**

[**_Team, we’ve seen what our movement is capable of achieving with the help of supporters like you. clean_body: This is huge, team | | Reuters: “Redistricting battles could determine control of US House in 2024” = This is huge, team. FIRST: Ahead of the 2022 midterm elections, grassroots supporters like you powered the NDRC’s fight to help secure fair maps across the country. In fact, according to the New York Times , last year’s election took place on “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” THEN: Earlier this summer, the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s map for violating the Voting Rights Act, requiring a new, fair map be put in place before the next election. According to experts, the ruling could impact maps in more states across the country, including Arkansas, Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, Texas, and others. NOW: With the upcoming redistricting action, there is a real path to the 2024 elections taking place on maps that are even fairer than the maps we helped secure in 2022! BUT: It will only happen if we stay committed to this fight. As President Obama reminded us, “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far.We simply cannot afford to do that. ” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Team Tuberville
subject: ⚠️ Fentanyl Epidemic Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Links inside to learn more >>>
| | |
Peter, The fentanyl epidemic is ravaging our nation, and Alabama is no exception. **Fentanyl is more like a poison than a drug. It can be fatal in small doses, and it’s easy to lace it into other drugs, vape pins, or even candy. ** This makes it a massive threat to our communities, especially among children and young adults. And local law enforcement needs all the help they can get to fight back. **That’s why Coach is proud to bring $200,000 of funding to the City of Fairhope to combat the fentanyl epidemic.** [**Read the article on NBC 15’s website to learn more >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7638de942d9b89a9/04ce4b4986f770b2c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Coach will never back down in the battle to bring drug dealers to justice and protect our kids from falling victim to this dangerous substance. -Team Tuberville

subject: Sign: Demand Jared Kushner be investigated for billions of highly questionable dollars he earned
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand House Republicans Investigate Jared Kushner](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72d2fa8d-f4d3-4bd5-a06d-4efe19600c25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T780fe5f0-eaeb-4d46-a3ab-4e587cdfa825/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | House Republicans have launched approximately eleventy zillion investigations of Hunter Biden, but they are doing nothing to get to the bottom of the billions (with a "B") of [highly questionable dollars](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7799526-3dc2-460b-845e-9b52f7782d86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) earned by Jared Kushner. Even Representative James Comer, Republican chairman of the Committee on Oversight and Responsibility, acknowledged that what Kushner did "crossed the line of ethics." It's time for him to do something about it. Representative Jamie Raskin, ranking member of that committee (and a hero for his impeachment work) is calling on Comer to stop blocking a real investigation of Kushner, and demand that Kushner hand over relevant documents to make that happen. We couldn't agree more. [**Sign the petition, support Raskin, and demand that House Republicans stop blocking a much needed investigation of Jared Kushner.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1126c88c-91d2-4e8e-85dc-b954c05a55ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Big Tax-Prep lobbyists are having a busy summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie Porter is calling them out.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29204%2E3422442%2E6ZYyIc)
The process of filing your taxes usually sucks. And that’s not by accident.
Big tax-prep companies have spent years lobbying Congress so that you, the taxpayer, have to shell out big bucks, hours of your Saturday, and all of your personal data, in order to file your taxes.
But in most cases, the IRS already has all of the information they need to process your tax liability or refund. That’s why Katie introduced a bill to create free and easy tax filing tools that anyone can use.
Here’s the good news: **Next year the IRS is piloting a free tool that will allow folks to file directly with the government.** But these massive tax-prep companies are lobbying against it.
Katie’s calling out their corporate greed and their attempt to rob taxpayers of a free and easier to use option.
[**Can you add your name in support of Katie’s work standing up to these profiteering corporations?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_big_tax_prep/?source=EMAL02_1_TAX_20230902_V1_F&t=2&akid=29204%2E3422442%2E6ZYyIc)
[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_big_tax_prep/?source=EMAL02_1_TAX_20230902_V1_F&t=3&akid=29204%2E3422442%2E6ZYyIc)
No matter the industry, Katie will always fight for consumers and stand up to the status quo. **She’s not afraid to call out corporate greed and influence because she’s one of just eleven Members of Congress who doesn’t take federal lobbyist money.**
Thanks for reading, and thanks for being a part of Team Porter.
–KPHQ
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230902-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAL02_1_TAX_20230902_V1_F&refcode2=29204_3422442_6ZYyIc&akid=29204%2E3422442%2E6ZYyIc)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL02_1_TAX_20230902_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=29204_3422442_6ZYyIc&akid=29204%2E3422442%2E6ZYyIc)**

name: Sean Feucht (iPhone)
subject: FWD: "Send Me" Now Available!!
body:
| | | Happy Saturday— Sean Feucht here with a special story about our new album, _SEND ME. _ We recorded the album live on the beach in Oceanside, California. Directly _before_ our event, was an explicit drag show! Before our event started, there was a heaviness in the air, the remnants of darkness. But our revival started, and with the first strum of the guitar, the sound of worship filled the air and the heaviness instantly left and was replaced with hope and joy! Passion for Jesus rose in the hearts of the people as they boldly worshiped, danced, rejoiced and the shackles began falling off people all over the beach. There were more salvations, healings, and breakthroughs than we can count - and the love of God POURED OUT across Oceanside, California. The album is called “SEND ME" and my prayer is these anthems launch worshipers with a sound of joy, freedom, and breakthrough into every dark crevice of the world to bring the kingdom. If you haven't listened yet, trust me, it's worth your time. God Bless, Sean Sent from my iPhone
---
|
---
From: Sean Feucht
Date: Friday, September 1, 2023
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: "Send Me" Now Available!!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b63deef5fcf04394b75b856eacbc124b&_e=tGs5FbaGGtYx6mrTY23WE_dXKZFkfK9knFk9kbZx6em5C_Mo97dIRTg9_wWfhuKnby7uEzHQWQ21fRFEM5Se3f3LZfjxOiKxHBgz3TZK_udLdP4hciN-nm2zwyD7gmdHLdcjv091VqA7xgft5ltzXc_ZJnQVqnsiOKJ2OLaobwm1SP2tHTidW5342YDjKOvIaFcCnqFy7fePZ7KGQqpqcPDmE9aQGpOIAPdFhim_ny2sT11bT6-_BMXCZflxuHeo8q6QXtbzQ43srgd4OtLWxrT34pdZ7JZmHVlcpLrJrGRfWmjgr-QAKCZDtQfOdUfT)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Our newest Let Us Worship album, **_SEND ME_** is now available for streaming and download on iTunes and Spotify!! This powerful time of worship was recorded LIVE on the beach in Oceanside, California!! We worshiped on the sand, people were baptized in the ocean, and God was glorified through it all! clean_body: | | | Happy Saturday— Sean Feucht here with a special story about our new album, SEND ME. We recorded the album live on the beach in Oceanside, California. Directly before our event, was an explicit drag show! Before our event started, there was a heaviness in the air, the remnants of darkness. But our revival started, and with the first strum of the guitar, the sound of worship filled the air and the heaviness instantly left and was replaced with hope and joy! Passion for Jesus rose in the hearts of the people as they boldly worshiped, danced, rejoiced and the shackles began falling off people all over the beach. There were more salvations, healings, and breakthroughs than we can count - and the love of God POURED OUT across Oceanside, California. The album is called “SEND ME" and my prayer is these anthems launch worshipers with a sound of joy, freedom, and breakthrough into every dark crevice of the world to bring the kingdom. If you haven't listened yet, trust me, it's worth your time. God Bless, Sean Sent from my iPhone | From: Sean Feucht Date: Friday, September 1, 2023 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: "Send Me" Now Available!! Dear Friend, Our newest Let Us Worship album, SEND ME is now available for streaming and download on iTunes and Spotify!! This powerful time of worship was recorded LIVE on the beach in Oceanside, California!! We worshiped on the sand, people were baptized in the ocean, and God was glorified through it all! Don't miss out on this powerful album of praise and worship— listen today! Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, “Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?” And I said, “Here am I. Send me!” —Isaiah 6:8 Till All Hear, Sean Feucht We've released 3️⃣ music videos from this album!! name: Team Nikki
subject: Starting September off on the right foot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, Thank you for your incredible support this past month. Whether it’s chipping in when you can or simply opening and reading our emails, please know that your support means the world to Nikki and our entire team as she cuts through the noise to deliver meaningful results for folks across Central and Southern Illinois. We’re reaching out today because we just reviewed our August numbers, and unfortunately, we fell slightly short of our fundraising goal. Although we don’t expect folks to chip in each time we ask, our campaign has stayed the course because this grassroots team has always shown up for us when it matters most. **That’s why we’ve set a flash fundraising goal to raise $1,000 by Monday.** This crucial goal will help us catch up and ensure we have a strong showing when our numbers become public shortly after our September 30 Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Some good news: the states that have made it EASIER to vote this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
States like New Mexico, Michigan, and Connecticut have protected the freedom to vote this year! |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69103492/425118434/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230902_f_somegoodnews_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkMGVkZC1hZTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d78CQqpBqpnDaX7sSbWwUY_j5GAtyEqEZ19j1XZVb8o=&emci=15bd0edd-ae49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=18bd0edd-ae49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | The daily news cycle can feel heavy. Extremists are attacking our rights, the climate crisis is destroying whole communities, a former president was just indicted for the fourth time...and so on. It can feel like there’s never a break. **So today, we want to take a moment to share some GOOD news with you from FiveThirtyEight:** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69103493/425118435/-1234785616?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230902_f_somegoodnews_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkMGVkZC1hZTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d78CQqpBqpnDaX7sSbWwUY_j5GAtyEqEZ19j1XZVb8o=) _*Since this article was published, there are now 29 states that have made it easier to vote._
---
You may be familiar with where extremists restricted the freedom to vote this year — in states like Ohio, Mississippi, Florida, and Georgia. These are blatant attacks on our democracy, and we, along with our partners, are continuing to fight back against these voter suppression attempts when they emerge.
**But we also want to talk about where legislators have made it EASIER for voters to make their voices heard:**
* **New Mexico** passed a major voting rights package to automatically register voters who interact with the state’s Motor Vehicle Division, to restore the right to vote for formerly incarcerated people, and to allow voters to request absentee ballots for all future elections without needing to reapply.
* **Michigan** enacted eight laws to expand voting rights — including guaranteeing at least nine days, and up to 29 days, of in-person early voting; allowing voters to fix mistakes on their absentee ballot envelopes and track absentee ballots online; and accepting student, military, or tribal IDs at polling places.
* **Connecticut** made history as the sixth state to pass a state-level voting rights act — barring municipalities from discriminating against marginalized groups in the voting process, ensuring a minimum of 14 days of early voting, adding a constitutional amendment to the 2024 ballot which could legalize no-excuse absentee voting, and more.

Fortunately, that’s just a handful of the dozens of pro-voter laws that have been enacted this year. We’re fighting to ensure that there are even more voting rights victories in 2023 and beyond — and we’re grateful for every Fair Fight Action supporter who helps to make it all possible.
Thank you!
The Fair Fight Action Team

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hello from Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what may be her toughest and most expensive election yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)
Hey Peter, this is Arizona Senator Mark Kelly. I recently joined my good friend and Senate colleague, Tammy Baldwin, on the campaign trail in Wisconsin. We sat down with veterans to talk about our work to expand VA health care and benefits and stopped by the state fair — where I got to try my first Wisconsin cream puff! [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m) **Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what will be her most competitive and expensive election yet.** Last year, the GOP threw everything but the sink at me trying to flip my seat. My opponent was as far-right as they come, and he had nearly unlimited resources from Mitch McConnell, wealthy dark-money donors, and national Republicans to run attacks against me. But with your grassroots support, we focused on our mission: delivering results for hard-working people, keeping our Democratic Senate majority, and defeating MAGA extremism at the ballot box. **It’s time to do the same for Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin.** National Republicans are recruiting far-right mega-millionaires to run against Tammy — people who are out-of-touch with the needs of Wisconsinites and have enough resources to write themselves $15 to $20 million campaign checks. Tammy is relying on the support of this incredible grassroots team to help her fight back. That’s why I’m asking: **[Can you pitch in a few bucks to help re-elect Tammy and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona last year, and I know they’ll make all the difference as we fight to keep Wisconsin blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-sep23.g8eV4w&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-sep23.saM6fI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-sep23.z86uBZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)

[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-sep23.TghmNL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)

| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-sep23.d8D94V&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230902_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1094%2E35263%2EsEOJ4m)

Thank you,
Mark

name: Tina Smith
subject: The Senate is back in session soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The best way for me to do my job is by hearing from you. |
#
Team — Happy September! I want to thank you for your support as we closed out our end-of-month fundraising for August. Because of this team’s generosity and support, **we smashed our digital fundraising goals and are in great shape for the fall.** And because the Senate heads back into session starting next week, I wanted to touch base with you to hear what’s on your mind and what you want to see my team and I work on. I’ll be focused on protecting reproductive rights from right-wing attacks. The Senate will also be working on passing a budget and keeping the government working for us all. And I’ll certainly do all that I can to get Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville to lift his blockade on military promotions, so that the hundreds of servicemembers waiting for their promotions can receive Senate votes. **The best way for me to do my job is by hearing from you.[Can you take a moment to fill out our September Priorities Survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69103926/425119717/-1931486665?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20230902_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWZkZDQwYy1iMTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XstY9ZENo7Db14cmZUIZ48bC69C2FulIsYV_gYX95Rk=&emci=c3eaadc1-ac49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=aefdd40c-b149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69103927/425119718/-1931486665?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20230902_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWZkZDQwYy1iMTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XstY9ZENo7Db14cmZUIZ48bC69C2FulIsYV_gYX95Rk=&emci=c3eaadc1-ac49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=aefdd40c-b149-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

Peter, Ritchie said it best:

**_“There is no set of people to whom we owe a greater debt than our senior citizens.”_**

That’s why he’s introducing new legislation: _the Right to Medicare Act._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69104361/425121291/340983499?refcode=RTFC_20230902_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRjMDAyYi1iMjQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7pprT2yZTa_jBwU9VKIdprbs86tn98XslJBdhO9spI=&emci=f5602ac6-e848-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa4c002b-b249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689) At a time where nearly **250,000 senior citizens** are being threatened with the loss of traditional Medicare in New York City _alone,_ this legislation has _never_ been more critical.

But Peter, House Republicans continue to threaten any program that enables our seniors to lead decent and dignified lives — _especially Medicare._ [That’s why we need at least 10,000 folks to citizen co-sponsor Ritchie’s legislation right now. Click here to sign your name! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69104362/425121292/340983499?refcode=RTFC_20230902_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRjMDAyYi1iMjQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7pprT2yZTa_jBwU9VKIdprbs86tn98XslJBdhO9spI=&emci=f5602ac6-e848-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa4c002b-b249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689) | [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: COSPONSOR THE RIGHT TO MEDICARE ACT NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69104363/425121293/340983499?refcode=RTFC_20230902_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRjMDAyYi1iMjQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7pprT2yZTa_jBwU9VKIdprbs86tn98XslJBdhO9spI=&emci=f5602ac6-e848-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa4c002b-b249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689)

Peter, it’s never been more important that we have your support — senior citizens everywhere are counting on it.

Thank you for joining Ritchie Torres in this fight,

_— Team Ritchie_

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

subject: BREAKING: Pekau Targets IR Publisher with Baseless Complaint
body:
Following President Biden's lead, Mayor Pekau now has initiated lawfare against IR Publisher Scott Kaspar.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f35cd17ea303/breaking-pekau-targets-ir-publisher-with-baseless-complaint?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Keith Pekau Using Democratic Playbook, Targets IR Publisher, Constituents with Baseless Election Board Complaint to Intimidate, Silence Political Enemies (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Pro-Tem Cindy Katsenes swears in Keith Pekau for his second term as Village President. (Source: Facebook/Village of Orland Park)
Taking a page out of embattled President Joe Biden’s political playbook, Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau now has initiated lawfare against his top political rival, IR Publisher Scott Kaspar.

Last night, on a Friday evening, just before this Labor Day weekend, Kaspar was served by Pekau’s cousin with a complaint signed by Pekau’s Mayor Pro-Tem and Orland Township committeewoman, Cindy Katsenes. The complaint was filed by Katsenes’ husband, Orland Park real estate lawyer Chris Katsenes.

Friday’s complaint against an Illinois Review owner marks the fulfillment of a threat first launched by IL GOP officials (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/sources-il-gop-leaders-threatening-to-sue-illinois-review-silence-leading-conservative-news-publication-in-blatant-attack-on-freedom-of-the-press.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on April 7, 2023 – Good Friday – and carried out by several others connected with IL GOP leadership over the Easter holiday weekend.

Pekau has curried favor with IL GOP state central committee members Jeanne Ives and Sean Morrison, both of whom had endorsed Pekau in his failed congressional run last year. Ives, along with RNC national committeeman Richard Porter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , were special guests invited by Katsenes to a get-out-the-vote rally just before the April 4th consolidated elections.

Pekau and Katsenes would see sweeping losses (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on April 4th, including 9 of their 10 endorsed candidates and a failed referendum in which two-thirds of the voters rejected Pekau’s attempted power grab to become a strong mayor like Chicago.

Katsenes’ complaint against the IR Publisher alleges various infractions for a mail piece endorsing Katsenes and others for re-election to the Orland Park village board put out by Kaspar and former Cook County commissioner and former Orland Township committeewoman Elizabeth Doody Gorman.

While the mail piece in question was sent out just before the April 4th consolidated election, Katsenes filed her complaint several months later on July 31, 2023, just hours after Illinois Review broke the story (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that Mayor Pekau was running his congressional campaign from taxpayer-funded village hall, disclosing campaign fundraising emails to Pekau’s and Katsenes’ official email accounts.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau and Village Trustees during a board meeting. (Source: Illinois Review)
In January, former Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign faced potential legal trouble when emails revealed campaign staffers were contacting Chicago Public School teachers (https://www.cbsnews.com/chicago/news/lightfoot-campaign-cps-teachers-student-volunteers-investigation/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and asking them to identify students who could volunteer on the mayor’s re-election campaign.

The American Civil Liberties Union (https://news.wttw.com/2023/01/12/lightfoot-campaign-emails-cps-teachers-may-violate-federal-law-aclu-illinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of Illinois immediately raised an alarm – citing a US Supreme Court case, saying the Lightfoot campaign “is inappropriately coercive and raises First Amendment concerns. The Supreme Court has made clear that government officials cannot use their office or power to coerce participation or to punish for lack of participation in political campaigns...”

In other words, Pekau and Katsenes – who oversee village contractors – cannot use their office to persuade people to donate to political campaigns – and in this case, the mayor’s congressional campaign.

Katsenes’ complaint against the IR Publisher alleges claims of deception because Kaspar’s and Gorman’s mail piece was funded by Gorman’s former
political committee (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CommitteeDetail.aspx?ID=x4W2EwSCJ2lVcDI2Xvyp8g%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Republican Organization of Orland Township, that Gorman presided over for years while serving as the Orland Township committeewoman. On March 3, 2023, Katsenes created a new committee (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CommitteeDetail.aspx?ID=qhMrvXiCeLs2w6mXOzUVrQ%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , also called Republican Organization of Orland Township—the same name as the former, but without $7000 in loan obligations (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedDebts.aspx?FiledDocID=YVzd3ZYbWa2RuGe4U0KF1Q%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) due to the former committee by Gorman. In other words, rather than repay her political rival money Gorman had loaned to the committee, Katsenes simply opened a new committee carte blanche.

Pekau, through his close ally Katsenes, is carrying out lawfare tactics we expect of countries like Russia and China. In Russia,
President Vladamir Putin (https://www.npr.org/2022/03/07/1084870797/russia-has-reasserted-state-control-over-the-country-s-major-media-companies?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) signed into law legislation that criminalizes news publications from reporting on anything that contradicts, or is critical of his administration.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Russian President Vladimir Putin chairs a meeting with members of the Security Council via a video link in Moscow, Russia, March 31, 2023. (Source: Sputnik/Alexei Babushkin/Kremlin via REUTERS)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Image: Maurizio Gambarini/dpa/picture alliance)
But it is no surprise, because Pekau has a long and well-documented history of attacking his political rivals.

In March, Pekau and another village trustee Sean Kampas were caught
harassing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) female Orland Fire Protection District candidates Angela Greenfield and Tina Zekich and their volunteers as they campaigned and knocked on doors in a local neighborhood just a week before the April elections.

Pekau and Kampas spent the morning following the group in Pekau’s Dodge Durango as they walked a nearby neighborhood to knock on doors and drop off literature.

Although Pekau and Kampas never got out of the car, numerous witnesses said the pair continued to follow the group as they knocked on doors – staring at them through the car windows in a sad attempt at intimidating the group of volunteers who were campaigning on behalf of candidates that they opposed. Greenfield and Zekich would go on to win their elections over Pekau’s preferred candidates.

Pekau also got heat from constituents for
attacking Chicago firefighters (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-orland-park-and-chicago-firefighters-with-baseless-accusations-calls-first-responders-an-embarrassment-to-their-profession.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , calling them an “embarrassment to their profession” a week after the Chicago Fire Department buried (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/fallen-chicago-firefighter-lt-jan-tchoryk-funeral-watch-live-st-joseph-ukrainian-church/3118165/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) two of its own.

https://youtu.be/kDwNFi0bNHM?si=6pGZTWOrJuRc-Z0H&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau calls out Chicago Firefighters, with no evidence, and refers to them as an “embarassment to their profession” during a village board meeting.

In May, it was revealed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that Pekau has used a political propaganda website masquerading as legitimate news publications, to control the narrative and ensure positive media coverage – publishing over 70 stories (https://southcooknews.com/organizations/645246137-keith-pekau-for-mayor/stories?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) dating back to his 2017 campaign for mayor – and most recently, his failed bid for Congress.

Pekau even lies about
crowd sizes (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/mayor-keith-pekau-brags-about-large-crowd-size-of-2500-during-orland-parks-free-concert-last-weekend-but-actual-photos-reveal-less-than-50-in-attendance.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . In July, Pekau hosted a free concert that garnered at most 50 attendees at any given time, but days later Pekau had the audacity to declare at a village board meeting that over 2,500 people attended his failed, but free event.

And while Pekau continues to attract incredibly small crowds, with his divisive and abusive behavior on full display, he continues to lay the groundwork to launch yet another congressional campaign.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/breaking-keith-pekau-using-democratic-playbook-targets-ir-publisher-constituents-with-baseless-election-board-complaint-to-intimidate-silence-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, top right, walking to the front to address a nearly-empty room at the Orland Park Public Library on March 22, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)
Although Pekau lacks the temperament to serve in elected office, he has proven, however, to be a better fit as a waiter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) at Ed Debevic’s, where being rude and a bully is part of the charm.

Perhaps it’s time for Pekau to think about a career change. And we’re not talking about Congress.
In China, a country that leads the world in jailing reporters, there are an estimated 274 journalists (https://www.theguardian.com/media/2020/dec/15/china-jails-the-most-journalists-for-second-year-running?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) currently in prison for reporting on stories that angered the ruling Communist political party – and citizen journalist Zhang Zahn sits in a Chinese prison for her reporting during the pandemic.

Zahn was sentenced to four years in
prison (https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/nov/05/chinese-journalist-jailed-over-covid-reporting-is-close-to-death-family-say?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for “picking quarrels and provoking trouble” because she questioned Chinese officials’ decision-making process during the early stages of the outbreak.
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1d6701c9d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_02_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1d6701c9d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Remembering Bill Richardson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69105557/425125353/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDcyMDFmNy1iNDQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lG8T1XEbZKLPDrkGfiiWswFsHiN_zhA3E7PopJJc2k=&emci=b1d55d1d-b249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fd7201f7-b449-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, Bill Richardson, New Mexico’s former governor and a longtime friend of mine, passed away yesterday. Back in 2006, Bill appointed me as Natural Resources Trustee for the state of New Mexico, and we worked together to preserve our state’s land and water resources. His appointment helped put me on the path I am on today, and for that I will always be grateful. Bill always believed in the potential of the Land of Enchantment. He never accepted mediocrity, and he pushed us to always see the best version of ourselves as a state and as a people. His time leading New Mexico was one of our state’s finest hours. Just days ago, Bill was nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize. After leaving electoral politics, he dedicated the rest of his career to the safe return of political prisoners and hostages around the world. I am enormously grateful for his service and was proud to be one of the four U.S. Senators who advocated for his nomination. Bill’s legacy will live on in New Mexico and in the many lives he transformed for the better. Julie’s and my sympathies are with Bill’s wife, Barbara, his family, and all who knew him. Thank you for taking a few minutes to remember Bill with me. — Martin
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69105559/425125355/1737618405?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDcyMDFmNy1iNDQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lG8T1XEbZKLPDrkGfiiWswFsHiN_zhA3E7PopJJc2k=&emci=b1d55d1d-b249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fd7201f7-b449-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045). name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: What we’re able to accomplish
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Thank you for supporting our re-election campaign.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=544%2E552475%2E0J91aD)
Hi Peter, it's Tiernan, Bob's campaign manager.
**I'm excited to share that we smashed through our August fundraising goal, thanks to the support of grassroots donors like you.**
We're building the foundation we need to face any challenge from now until Election Day. But as I'm looking at our campaign budget, it's clear that we're going to need to keep up the momentum to re-elect Bob in what is going to be his toughest race yet.
We have to plan out how we're going to compete with the millions upon millions of dollars that Mitch McConnell, national Republicans, and GOP super PACs are preparing to spend against us.
And from traveling across the state, to putting TV ads on the air, to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast. We need to reach folks from Erie to Philly and everywhere in between, so we can't leave anything on the table.
**That's why one of the most impactful ways you can support Bob Casey for Senate is by starting a monthly recurring contribution of any amount.** Knowing that we have a dedicated base of support every month is one of the best ways to help us plan ahead and combat GOP spending.
**[So if you can, will you become a monthly recurring donor today? Any amount you can commit to will be a massive help to our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230902-1?refcode=em20230902-1&recurring=true&refcode2=544_552475_0J91aD&akid=544%2E552475%2E0J91aD)**
**[Donate Monthly »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230902-1?refcode=em20230902-1&recurring=true&refcode2=544_552475_0J91aD&akid=544%2E552475%2E0J91aD)**
Thank you again for helping us blow our August fundraising goal out of the water. We couldn't do this without you -- I'm glad you're a part of the team.
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate
P.S. If you can't commit to a monthly donation at this time, that's okay too! **[One-time donations are a huge help as well.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230902-1?refcode=em20230902-1&refcode2=544_552475_0J91aD&akid=544%2E552475%2E0J91aD)**
**[Make a one-time donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230902-1?refcode=em20230902-1&refcode2=544_552475_0J91aD&akid=544%2E552475%2E0J91aD)**

Republicans at all levels of government are waging an all-out push to OUST Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis -- the prosecutor who handed Trump his fourth indictment for interfering in Georgia's election.

This is just the latest stunt in the broader plot by Republicans to diminish and take control of our elections. In critical battlegrounds like Texas, Michigan and Pennsylvania Republicans are working to handpick local election officials and fill vacancies in “Democratic strongholds.”

**Apparently nothing is off the table, including REMOVING non-political District Attorneys who would dare enforce the law to protect our elections.**

**1.7 million Pennsylvania public school students now have access to a free meal every morning before classes** – allowing students to concentrate and focus on their studies, not their stomachs.
The data doesn’t lie: Well-fed children are more likely to attend classes and participate both inside and outside of the classroom.
And this is a huge boost for families, too. Parents won’t have to worry and stress about their children being hungry at the beginning of the school day.
**Governor Shapiro knows that universal free breakfast is a worthy investment in the future of our Commonwealth, and it’s just the start of our work to ensure Pennsylvania is a place where every family can learn, grow and thrive.[_Now, will you make an investment to help Josh continue delivering real opportunity and results in every corner of Pennsylvania?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69106198/425127823/-1162444457?refcode=email_090223_Free-breakfast&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzI0YzMyYy1iODQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6gPFXB5R9EoAlbQAvy_NrNzLg9lFpWerhWqnlKTSIMo=)**

subject: FULL Press Conference 08.31.2023
body:
Chairwoman Kristina Karamo criticizes the media's coverage of election fraud in Michigan and their double standards on gun control. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Chairwoman Kristina Karamo held a press conference on Thursday at our Lansing headquarters to address the recent BOMBSHELL reports on election corruption from Muskegon. She also answered inquiries from the press.
In this conference, Kristina, along with MIGOP State-Committee members Braden Giacobazzi, Lori Skibo, and Election Integrity Committee chair Phil O’Halloran asked why a voter registration company, who received **millions of dollars** from multiple Democratic Party Organizations, including **Joe Biden** , would need five handguns and five semiautomatic rifles, some with suppressors (the same weapons the Democratic Party says you shouldn’t have).

1. **Who were they prepared to shoot?**
2. **What were they defending?**

Chair Karamo criticized the double standards of the Democratic party and media regarding AR-15 possession by Americans. Watch the full press conference below or follow the link to watch on our NEW Rumble account.

We made it, Peter!

I want to personally thank you for standing by my side through such a critical end-of-month push. I truly mean it when I say—without supporters like you, our movement wouldn’t stand a fighting chance against Tate Reeves and the cronies bankrolling his campaign.

But now everything we've built will be put to the test. **We’re nearly two months away from Election Day and just a few weeks from another quarterly public filing deadline** —and yes, that means our internal fundraising numbers will be made public again.

[Our progress hinges on what we do from this moment forward, Peter. So we need to raise $108,000 online by September 30th to stay competitive in this race. Can I count on you to chip in $25 (or whatever you can) to kickstart our end-of-quarter push?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69106617/425129112/974620941?amount=25&refcode=ea.247ff789-ba49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.247ff789-ba49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjQ3ZmY3ODktYmE0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kFjf5n8Mct5a0DYdG1_svuP-O2ujfTuF_GcLsldl9M0=)

Your commitment today means you're dedicated to building a state that values the truth and puts the good folks of Mississippi first. It means you’re ready to shake up the status quo and put power back in the hands of the people, not the special interests.

And, it means you’re ready to finally get rid of the most self-serving (and most unpopular) governor in the entire country.

**These last two months aren’t going to be easy, but it will all be worth it on November 7th when we finally defeat Tate Reeves.

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: I’m so thankful to have your support.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69106672/425129310/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjViN2VkOWMtYmE0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xj2GX-QZBPC9QU8jc8BiCCEE_PklfNggECYXcepCJ5Y=)
Peter, I know it’s a holiday weekend so I’ll make this quick:

I wanted to let you know how thankful I am to have your support. **Because of you, we hit our August fundraising goal and remain in a strong position to keep CA-47 blue!**

I could not run this campaign without you, and your support means more to me than you know. Together, we have built a true grassroots-powered campaign, fueled and focused on the people in our community.

**It’s people like you, Peter, who keep me motivated.** I’m not running to represent special interests or corporate PACs in Congress. I’m running to represent you, to put our district first, and get Washington working again.

So thank you for your support this past month. With your help, we will win this fight to keep CA-47 blue and keep extremists out of power.

In unity,

Joanna

subject: RE: Sign now to guarantee housing as a human right:
