body:
Join me: Affirm the dignity of unhoused people! | |
---
Peter, As Co-Chair of the Congressional Caucus on Homelessness, Cori Bush just reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, which provides a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027. The legislation calls on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency, and calls for rigorous federal investments into affordable housing initiatives, homeless assistance programs, and wraparound services that will keep people permanently housed. With rising rental costs rapidly outpacing wages, more and more families are forced out on the streets, where they are criminalized and dehumanized. Cori understands this urgency firsthand because she has been unhoused, living in a car with her two children. **[Please read Cori’s email below, then sign on today to become a grassroots co-sponsor of her Unhoused Bill of Rights, which affirms the dignity of unhoused people and lays out how we can secure housing as a human right.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I--ZSfdrWS5VYh6QEc6DVG0uG4bERX7qdemNCLNselIjf1hOgTLC5hyQrPUliKIh4GenNpoLyUhUt2v6azEnC_R-z2uFmbTth8Hopx7-BaC_LfTcrO6MLGTsKjYc/3z9/gE88A8JMRvqgqwjVKawLAA/h0/hbjE8t22-E6oVT7Cfp0h23p0S3FyOXMt54Bkag2HCyk)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I-fr6E2B3NYIl6n6nsHmDGPC5Oipl6F8IvQrjHh1xbxuuoy05m1cVAIc4Xd4jcSWrloqGRGUlvNAOKxHy2PLdI56jkli4BsqsXYSbuSCSLD0zT0IaPYykEAFU8HVzZW4gw0z14rv381amuJ82PmfwFVWDI0xZkWvV2IUTipKZ7vE8N6CxKwzzxpIKgHD0qeJkeukWVa9KKrbyzsKtXn2qZOTZl5NGbg1hqKEmkVsq_l838IonsefCCdVODwSAmX32iFHpz70zoIw2l2G9ofV7Z5N1peZ1xOW2ZYLpoV1KiMKT9e4T_Jk4EHhZoEZzHtiR-7_90DW5QiwlgllCRqKNDT4-Ze9NxDHEy1TKlJjK2pjb4RSI21N2e1MhIkpxYKvX7ZV-wzSoo7r1uRq6HMjH-d8sLBqVjFCzxoLu-6KLXT0dahf3nqOotSywAQULD93AhJbtc/3z9/gE88A8JMRvqgqwjVKawLAA/h1/ROhVwdpKh0wcj33cla1lhSELtWUyc5rPE0Hdudic7ls) ** **Two years ago, Cori led her fellow members of Congress in a 5-day action to extend the federal eviction moratorium as it was set to expire.** During their 4 nights and 5 days on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, she negotiated with the White House and Congressional leaders, and succeeded in reinstating the ban on evictions and keeping 11 million people in their homes. But as Cori has said, we must do more than prevent evictions. We have a housing crisis and skyrocketing rents, and our work won’t be done until we guarantee housing as a human right for every person in the country. In solidarity, Team Cori
* * *
\---Original Message--- Peter, I know what it’s like to be unhoused, living in a car with my two children. And I don’t want anyone else to experience that trauma and pain, which is why I’m working relentlessly on housing justice in Congress. **Two years ago, I led a 5-day action to extend the federal eviction moratorium as it was set to expire.** During our four nights and five days on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, I negotiated with the White House and Congressional leaders, and we succeeded in reinstating the ban on evictions -- keeping 11 million people in their homes. **But we must do more than prevent evictions.** We have a housing crisis including skyrocketing rents and increased homelessness, and our work won’t be done until we guarantee housing as a human right for every person in the country. **That’s why I have reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, affirming the dignity of unhoused people and laying out how we can end the unhoused crisis by 2027.** [**Please sign on today as a grassroots co-sponsor of my Unhoused Bill of Rights and ensure the government secures housing as a human right.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I-fr6E2B3NYIl6n6nsHmDGPC5Oipl6F8IvQrjHh1xbxuuoy05m1cVAIc4Xd4jcSWrloqGRGUlvNAOKxHy2PLdI56jkli4BsqsXYSbuSCSLD0zT0IaPYykEAFU8HVzZW4gw0z14rv381amuJ82PmfwFVWDI0xZkWvV2IUTipKZ7vE8N6CxKwzzxpIKgHD0qeJkeukWVa9KKrbyzsKtXn2qZOTZl58IxDRALj9CnksnueD39MjFZGf3SHONhidGa_jYls8K8DJ1m-MZR_T2hxs_AT4Y06h7zIJogPdqhCX5Z1R9fnERdDF6DHnDyOoEuMhBcZF_7FxN7VpSVdGK8MgdGlJeJen_tIMIDt8xsKLzsgtOlPm4Y_UhqiqWoG7O7IpQ1hPbQeqLOifd4IAAzWxwqKnIbHPGm3u_ke5cZFEk3NiEKucJdX34JGpUePB14iyfWWc7o/3z9/gE88A8JMRvqgqwjVKawLAA/h2/EHcx7_fK9UMwBwlmkLL0BfSvnnL-p1c6iMWjxajsvI8) **[ADD YOUR ** This is urgent: Rising housing costs continue to rapidly outpace wages, forcing more families out on the streets. **We have the power and the money to guarantee housing as a human right, and now we need our budgets to reflect our values and priorities.** The Unhoused Bill of Rights provides a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027 with holistic, health-based, and non-carceral solutions. The legislation calls on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency, and calls for rigorous federal investments into affordable housing initiatives, assistance programs for people who are unhoused, and wraparound services that will keep people permanently housed. It’s no secret that lowering the costs of prescription drugs for seniors wasn’t easy. One of the reasons it was so difficult? **Big Pharma has long tried to stand in our way.**
Even while millions of Americans have struggled to afford their medications due to high costs, Big Pharma spent more on stock buybacks and dividends than they spent on research and development.
No one should have to choose between putting food on the table or paying for medicine. It’s long past time to lower prescription drug costs for all and stand up against Big Pharma’s prescription drug price gouging – **and having Medicare negotiate the price of prescription drugs is a major step towards that goal.**

body:
| | | Peter, I can’t wait to take back the Senate next November.
Republicans have so much we want to accomplish, and we’re ready to get to work to undo Joe Biden’s disasters of the past two years.
_But first, we have a few orders of business._
**After we missed our end-of-month goal, we had to extend our cutoff to[TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7e257795703c4c1685dcb71a25e27589&_e=IxUJ5umRrCkgJp29LHc1mBejmGQZB-bks7y8fsVeslpBwkA9VMsJEGuX4lpoDx0bwdTk2bMAmFNQwire6cHSfbtng66eVrr4zEmZAKJJY1Lm0ScmShSZLL2iwoIYrmePcnmxNjOxY-L99EsAMlQdWaGLTwu8yFbkLTfeOp-23ACCc6LkNG_BSNs4T5LR2wU3Fc_u0QDuKutwZJJB2kjt8Va6bQ6WLJIBX3TNeeENPEgPKrDnGy-akP4va3PBzVQI9qlD41o83hv1KvSAA6Rwl5a3sdy1No8JsVK1zkxTvcylUbQRTPNngZ4dz5uPD2p76M3kSjwFeOx7k63PTu3RrGjNBOxyWKA-Nc0Ja-XOHuIQYdlkSbio84em8Ilu4NIe)**

Republicans have so much we want to accomplish, and we’re ready to get to work to undo Joe Biden’s disasters of the past two years. But first, we have a few orders of business. After we missed our end-of-month goal, we had to extend our cutoff to I reached out to some of my top grassroots patriots earlier today, but with hours to go, we’re still not at our goal. This is it. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | This campaign is only possible because of the support of people like you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything. We have a lot of hard work ahead of us. In fact, just last week, one of my opponents announced that he was putting in $600,000 of his own money to try and win this race, nearly two times the amount of money he raised himself. You shouldn’t have to be wealthy to run for office – and win. I might not have lots of money, but I do have deep public service experience and a commitment to working every day to serve the people of Rhode Island’s First Congressional District. So, thank you for all that you have done to help get us to this point. If you can, help us fund the next phase of the campaign by contributing any amount that you are able: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Gabe Amo and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | With gratitude, Gabe The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Come along with Team Dolan as we strive to **TAKE BACK THE SENATE** from the Democrats.

clean_body: Don't worry, we have some great news! | Hey, there Peter! This isn't like you, but I am here to tell you that we pulled some strings so that you could have ONE LAST CHANCE to donate. I get it. Life happens, and sometimes deadlines slip us by. That is why I am giving you more time to pitch in. Come along with Team Dolan as we strive to TAKE BACK THE SENATE from the Democrats. Matt Dolan | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

**Why pitch in today?**

**→ Empower our candidates:** Democrats are fighting for Pennsylvania workers and families – but our GOP opponent is focused on supporting Trump’s lies and parroting hateful, right-wing conspiracies.

Please, chip in $27 now to help me keep up the fight against DeSantis and his GOP mega donors >>__**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/bDJ023OnRmUj3i87JTwyRQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm1gooP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpc2Zhc2Npc21fZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlVucXNuNjdhdmpvTWp5R2g4UHRra3ppNEk1JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJVbnFzbjY3YXZqb01qeUdoOFB0a2t6aTRJNSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVW5xc242N2F2am9NanlHaDhQdGtremk0STVXA3NwY0IKZPAohfNkzt5vwlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Ron DeSantis is a fascist. He is abusing his power to advance his own personal political ambitions and hurting Floridians every day he remains in power.

Here are just SOME of the atrocious things he has done this past year:
* Banned books about Black and brown history from our public schools
* Banned gender-affirming care for trans youth
* Replaced public university leaders with his extreme MAGA lapdog friends and gave them TWICE the salary to destroy our schools
* Proposed a permitless carry bill that would allow Floridians to carry concealed firearms without a permit OR training
* Tried to revoke the liquor license of an event venue in my district because they hosted a drag show
* Rejected an African American Studies course from the AP curriculum and then “celebrated” Black History Month at his mansion
* Gathered personal medical data on transgender university students and educators

If you disagree with Gov. Ron DeSantis, he’ll abuse his power to close down your business, take over your school, remove your classes, and unconstitutionally fire you.

**Our differences make our state a stronger, more just place. They bring us together, and help us fully understand what Ron DeSantis really is — a fascist. We’ve got a fight ahead, but _community_ will always triumph over hate.** [**_That’s why I need you with me, Peter. We have no choice but to use our collective power to make sure DeSantis and his extremist MAGA cronies know we won’t back down. I need 300 Democrats to stand with me today to ensure we can hit our End of Week deadline and keep up the fight against fascism. Can I count on you to pitch in $27 now, Peter? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/bDJ023OnRmUj3i87JTwyRQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm1gooP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpc2Zhc2Npc21fZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlVucXNuNjdhdmpvTWp5R2g4UHRra3ppNEk1JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJVbnFzbjY3YXZqb01qeUdoOFB0a2t6aTRJNSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVW5xc242N2F2am9NanlHaDhQdGtremk0STVXA3NwY0IKZPAohfNkzt5vwlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/GT0WYgO9CLPc_ITOXvMZtQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm1gooP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpc2Zhc2Npc21fZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTEwJmNkbWM9MlVucXNuNjdhdmpvTWp5R2g4UHRra3ppNEk1JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJVbnFzbjY3YXZqb01qeUdoOFB0a2t6aTRJNSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVW5xc242N2F2am9NanlHaDhQdGtremk0STVXA3NwY0IKZPAohfNkzt5vwlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

body:
Service before self.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69110316/425136087/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230902_cd_values&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTIzZDcxMC1jMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gI8GUHWM7lN_lTJsRpAdmbWUqUXKJihmGLmOngttz08=)

Hi Derek, When I was in the Navy—whether at the Naval Academy, on the ground in Iraq, or at sea—I lived by a simple idea: **Ship, shipmate, self.** It's something I've carried forward as a husband, father of three, son, community member, voting rights lawyer, union organizer, and member of Congress devoted to the public. I'm from a small town in Western PA, and it's clear to me that this lesson isn't unique to the military. You can see service before self everywhere – at local community centers, small businesses, schools, and workplaces. It's a commitment to help your neighbors, show up for your family and coworkers, and get up every day ready to do hard work. **I'm running for reelection because right-wing politicians are taking this country toward a motto of power at any cost, of service for self, and I won't sit back and let them win**. Republicans are siding with corporate jagoffs and leaving workers to fend for themselves. **The GOP (drunk on the myth of trickle-down economics) is rewarding big business with looser regulations and tax breaks at the expense of the safety and prosperity of American families.** And they're stepping over our democracy by aiding and abetting Donald Trump and right-wing extremists. **I believe that serving the Common Good comes first.** That's why I'm running a campaign to defend the union way of life, reproductive rights, hard-earned benefits for workers, and our democracy. [_**I won the election in 2022 by single digits, and this election is going to be tight. I’m going to need a strong grassroots team behind me every step of the way, so can I count on you to support my campaign for service before self today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69110345/425136099/-1807168276?refcode=230902_cd_values_l1&ms=230902_cd_values&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTIzZDcxMC1jMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gI8GUHWM7lN_lTJsRpAdmbWUqUXKJihmGLmOngttz08=) That's why I'm running a campaign to defend the union way of life, reproductive rights, hard-earned benefits for workers, and our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your continued support, Derek. Chris Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue? = = PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69111298/425136368/1109344266?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1297-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkYTA1ODllLWMzNDktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R1_gxfFvAv3ITirGjmF9tPtBy6m66cRC4RofIl-HZZo=&emci=20481fb5-f348-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=eda0589e-c349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

Peter, it’s almost Labor Day, and our woman-led movement is charging forward to continue the fight for our rights.
You see, when Emerge recruits Democratic women to run for office, we always hear this: Women are motivated to deliver for their communities on everyday kitchen table issues. That means **securing workplace protections, achieving living wages and equal pay, addressing the affordability crisis in child care, and more. **
Labor rights issues are foundational issues, and their impact can be felt in every other area of our lives. **That’s why we’re reaching out to hear from you directly, Peter.[We’re counting on 150 of our top Emerge supporters – including you – to take our Emerge Women & Work Survey before the deadline at midnight TOMORROW. With your insights, we can keep building our nationwide movement to transform politics, achieve policies that prioritize equality, and create lasting support in our communities.
Thank you for adding your voice today. We look forward to reading your response.
– Team Emerge
Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69111304/425136371/-743428587?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1297-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkYTA1ODllLWMzNDktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R1_gxfFvAv3ITirGjmF9tPtBy6m66cRC4RofIl-HZZo=)**

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: a thank you & reflection:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi Peter - thank you for your continued support throughout this month.

Thanks to this grassroots movement, we were able to meet our August monthly digital fundraising goal. Now, I hope you’re taking advantage of the holiday weekend.

On Monday, our country will celebrate Labor Day - a holiday to honor the hard work, bloodshed, and sacrifice that generations past put in to deliver us critical workers’ rights many consider routine.

_Our labor movement pushed us forward, but still, our work isn’t done._ In Congress, I promise I will fight as hard as I can for workers’ safety, wages, benefits, and rights - and I’m honored to have that opportunity because of folks like you, Peter.

So thank you, Peter, and please enjoy your holiday weekend.

_Yadira Caraveo_ |
---

| PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
---
Caraveo for Congress
PO Box 953
Eastlake, CO 80614
United States

subject: We have what it takes

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-sept2023-FR-september?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-sept2023-FR-september?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Hey, team.

I'm excited to share that our August fundraising numbers are nothing short of impressive. Your unwavering support has fortified our re-election campaign and puts us on solid ground as we enter September. These are the kinds of figures that the MAGA Mob and Kevin McCarthy dread, and it's invigorating to see our collective efforts pay off.

Summer is traditionally challenging for campaign fundraising, but maintaining robust numbers in August primes us for the surge of attacks we anticipate from GOP extremists in the lead-up to November 2024. Their stance on issues like support for working families, reproductive rights, and marriage equality speaks volumes, and we must continue to fortify our position to ensure they don't succeed.

Team, September will be crucial — our big FEC deadline where our numbers will go public. It’s our chance to show that we have what it takes to run the MAGA Circus out of Washington.

I'm setting our sights on transforming our strong movement into an unbeatable one.

Will you help us make it happen, team? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2023-FR-September?&refcode=E3994-20230902-EOMThanks-SL-Other&amount=15]

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2023-FR-September?&refcode=E3994-20230902-EOMThanks-SB-Other&amount=15]

Your continued backing is immensely valuable to us. Thank you once again for your commitment to our cause.

Best regards,

Eric

...and one that will fight for us, too

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69117471/425138025/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230902_team_new_look&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMDYwM2EtYzg0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=radCIaVrgqBG6Vk7f8p44B20wQW8tLxoaBxK9n7HjMc=)
---
Today's electorate is the most diverse in history, friend. Immigrants, young people, LGBTQ+ Americans, people of color, working families — we're all helping to make our communities stronger and more vibrant than ever before. **[It's time we elected a Congress that looks like us, and one that will fight for us too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69117472/425138026/-1233768706?refcode=230902_team_new_look_l1&refcode2=7810603a-c849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=230902_team_new_look&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMDYwM2EtYzg0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=radCIaVrgqBG6Vk7f8p44B20wQW8tLxoaBxK9n7HjMc=)** Sepi is a trailblazer. She was the first woman of color elected to the West Hollywood City Council, the first female Iranian mayor in California, and the first openly LGBTQ+ Iranian woman to hold public office in the world. But more than that, she's lived the same struggles facing many Americans today. Sepi was undocumented until age 16. She worked her way through college and law school, and is still paying off her student debt. At every step of the way, she's been told that people like her didn't belong — in high school when she came out, at a coffee shop when she was holding her girlfriends hand, on the City Council and in the Mayor's office. **But the truth is, friend, Congress is _exactly_ where someone like Sepi belongs. We need members in Congress who have an intersectional lens and lived experience creating policies that benefit all of us rather than the same politicians who have been part of a dysfunctional establishment, creating policies that continue to benefit the privileged, the top 1 percent, and special interest groups while leaving the rest of us breadcrumbs. ** Sepi is a tireless fighter for civil rights, economic opportunity, and a brighter future for every Californian. She's exactly the kind of representative we need in Congress; one who has lived like us, listens to us, and will fight for us. there._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69117473/425138027/-1233768706?refcode=230902_team_new_look_l2&refcode2=7810603a-c849-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=230902_team_new_look&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMDYwM2EtYzg0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=radCIaVrgqBG6Vk7f8p44B20wQW8tLxoaBxK9n7HjMc=) Hi friend,
I just wanted to reach out and say, from the bottom of my heart: **Thank you!**

Over the last week, I saw folks from every corner of Oregon (and the country!) step up, pitch in, and support our grassroots campaign. And because of _your_ generosity, we were able to surpass our August fundraising goal.

**This grassroots team always reaffirms my belief that change is possible in a single generation.** It’s because of people like you that we’re going to create a stronger future for every child and family across Oregon. It’s an honor to be in this fight with you.

Thank you for supporting our campaign,

_Andrea_

body:
The women standing up to white supremacists like Jim Jordan and Donald Trump.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69121583/425140577/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWZhMmU0YmItZDA0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X16OF915vOePO8KhPwTzFo8Qq5fArCux3vhj6uiUXyI=)
---
Friend, Jim Jordan recently announced that the House Judiciary Committee will be launching a bogus, hyper-partisan investigation into the Georgia state criminal proceedings against Donald Trump. Jordan’s singular point of focus? Fulton County DA Fani Willis, who made the decision to prosecute Trump and 18 co-defendants after an exhaustive 2-year inquiry into their efforts to subvert the 2020 election results in Georgia. While Jordan’s fact-free screeds about Hunter Biden, Trump’s criminal indictments (91 charges and counting!), and “leftist woke culture” are generally unhinged, he reserves a special venom for Ms. Willis and the judge overseeing Trump’s Georgia case, Judge Tanya Chutkan. Each of these individuals share two main attributes that separate them from every other target of Jim Jordan’s ire: **they are both confident, intelligent Black women standing up to white supremacists like Trump and Jordan**.

He is using his power and influence as a federal official to openly interfere with a state judicial criminal proceeding. Jim Jordan could, and should, be facing a criminal indictment of his own for his efforts to obstruct justice for Trump. clean_body: The women standing up to white supremacists like Jim Jordan and Donald Trump.| | | = Friend, Jim Jordan recently announced that the House Judiciary Committee will be launching a bogus, hyper-partisan investigation into the Georgia state criminal proceedings against Donald Trump. Jordan’s singular point of focus? Fulton County DA Fani Willis, who made the decision to prosecute Trump and 18 co-defendants after an exhaustive 2-year inquiry into their efforts to subvert the 2020 election results in Georgia. While Jordan’s fact-free screeds about Hunter Biden, Trump’s criminal indictments (91 charges and counting!), and “leftist woke culture” are generally unhinged, he reserves a special venom for Ms. Willis and the judge overseeing Trump’s Georgia case, Judge Tanya Chutkan. Each of these individuals share two main attributes that separate them from every other target of Jim Jordan’s ire: they are both confident, intelligent Black women standing up to white supremacists like Trump and Jordan. = = Jim Jordan is abusing his position as a Member of Congress and as Chair of one of the most important committees in the House. He is using his power and influence as a federal official to openly interfere with a state judicial criminal proceeding. Jim Jordan could, and should, be facing a criminal indictment of his own for his efforts to obstruct justice for Trump. But until Jordan is officially indicted, we have to focus on what we can do right now—work to defeat him in this election. As we approach the end of August, we need your support so that Tamie can keep doing the critical work to defeat Jordan. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= or**= Tamie is connecting with new voters every single day, spending her time organizing and engaging with her community in the district while Jim Jordan spends all of his time yelling about liberals on Fox News. We can win this—so long as we have your support. Thank you for everything. -Team Tamie Wilson for Congress | | | | Tamie Wilson** Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Wolf Petition: Sign now to protect gray wolves from brutal trophy hunters
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963094?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let brutal trophy hunters massacre innocent gray wolves and wolf pups!**[**Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963095?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Innocent wolves are being _**dynamited**_ in their dens while nursing their pups. Baby wolf pups are left _**bleeding out in steel traps**_ and _**slowly choking to death in snares.**_ Their tiny cries for help fall on deaf ears, covered by the sound of bloodhounds _**tearing their flesh apart**_ and loud bullets _**piercing their organs**_. Ruthless trophy hunters are _**VIOLENTLY SLAUGHTERING**_ helpless wolves and wolf pups, and we’re running out time to save them. [**Friend, will you answer their desperate cries for help right now and help protect these precious animals before they’re wiped out forever?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963096?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963097?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In the states surrounding Yellowstone National Park, some of the most _**horrific and inhumane**_ hunting methods to KILL harmless gray wolves are already _COMPLETELY LEGAL_. And right now, corrupt politicians who are in bed with the hunting lobby and Big Polluters are threatening to _**REVERSE**_ the few remaining Endangered Species Act protections that this iconic mammal has left.
_**Not even gray wolves in Yellowstone itself are safe from merciless trophy hunters.**_ While gray wolves are protected in the park, animals do not understand state lines and often wander harmlessly across. Yellowstone has recently lost a RECORD HIGH of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 precious wolves behind.
Friend, gray wolves are one of the nation’s most treasured native animals, and they’re counting on us to give them a chance at recovery and survival. But the situation is dire and urgent, and we’re up against powerful forces who are determined to remove life-saving protections for these beloved canines — so we cannot afford another moment of inaction. **We need 4,309 more signatures by 11:59 P.M.** tonight to demonstrate strong public support for stronger gray wolf protections. [**Can defenseless gray wolves and wolf pups count on you to be their voice right now? Add your name now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963098?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963097?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting gray wolves from brutal trophy hunters.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Al Franken
subject: another big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country.

**Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby!**

[**While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52355?t=6&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52356?t=7&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52357?t=8&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52358?t=9&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52359?t=10&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52355?t=11&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more!

We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal.
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52355?t=12&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
(The really tall guy is Josh.)
After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers.

**Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy.**

[**So what do you say? Will you split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between the Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52355?t=13&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)

Thanks,

Al

P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [**So donate now!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52355?t=14&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10273%2E878179%2EvWE5Ea)

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Official favors from Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Fellow American,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Fellow American. Hi, . Andrew here from Bob Lorinser for Congress. I'm Dr. Bob's son, and communications director. It's a family affair - because for my dad, becoming a representative in Congress isn't just a job, it's a vocation.
I need two minutes. Will you watch this? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings] For my dad, politics is personal because of how policies directly affect people's lives.
For far too long, our district (MI01) has had a Congressman voting against their interests, against jobs, against infrastructure investments, and even democracy itself.
Rep. Jack Bergman ignited the Big Lie that led to Jan. 6, tried to decertify the 2020 presidential election, and disregarded our votes!
I'm biased of course, but I believe my dad is the perfect candidate to replace an extremist like Jack Bergman. His qualifications and experience are unparalleled, and he's passionate about supporting the working class to help rural America thrive.
I would be grateful if you could watch his story [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings] , and if you agree with his vision, consider contributing to our campaign.
Every dollar counts. $5, $10, $25 or more, we need you in our corner.
Thank you!
Andrew Lorinser

Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4f266d82fe804e61ab60e9ff2836483c&_e=VnJSYZvg1mLI2MNPmk_xrBA6wf0erzWE_yvDCwHwqIm0HKEdagXbmrVu661J-XlzjrnjqIRgcrkRjES1OC8-NIGtMqnD-7kJdiY4nmnM4fXbFM3jdsQW0CPyWNtNfu1mR0ak9073tnz-NR-w-oW9UVciKl-6zKhFVNlwrtEYTdLeZ1FddvoRm5IxNOY3D234PEkFV3aFDZKJySU8QGl-rQJ5BK34wYu5lV7WXbpPwhHQpSZxnk-XvG-QtIqC7D4ImIojx_kMA-CJr8Wgh36rCgKtDvnwRQRuT_0ANqPW6SNlxJHvw5BB8Ego5IDRXpVBSEWx-vT3p9UEK8_uKNX1_OF6-L-RPQAbeVlKaRS6oc9jnKS6TVGbM5vBzyn8hGYX)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4f266d82fe804e61ab60e9ff2836483c&_e=VnJSYZvg1mLI2MNPmk_xrBA6wf0erzWE_yvDCwHwqIm0HKEdagXbmrVu661J-XlzjrnjqIRgcrkRjES1OC8-NIGtMqnD-7kJdiY4nmnM4fXbFM3jdsQW0CPyWNtNfu1mR0ak9073tnz-NR-w-oW9UVciKl-6zKhFVNlwrtEYTdLeZ1FddvoRm5IxNOY3D234PEkFV3aFDZKJySU8QGl-rSPc-o0rAT02GZUgDnP-5NFvomlHkCBKnKC2UeJ5V7dAPsPzKuTI6g7HKBb-kjEhz1FwF4Ql6-eU7FnCx8xpMJoJTGUmW0LyTGadoOjxx9D4KmqI8ANf93WGc-lfHswiwdPSxXpVWKc2O8E3Si2P0KvYSuBSgWvM--mUpnPCfraQ)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4f266d82fe804e61ab60e9ff2836483c&_e=VnJSYZvg1mLI2MNPmk_xrBA6wf0erzWE_yvDCwHwqIm0HKEdagXbmrVu661J-XlzjrnjqIRgcrkRjES1OC8-NIGtMqnD-7kJdiY4nmnM4fXbFM3jdsQW0CPyWNtNfu1mR0ak9073tnz-NR-w-oW9UVciKl-6zKhFVNlwrtEYTdLeZ1FddvoRm5IxNOY3D234PEkFV3aFDZKJySU8QGl-rSnoDxl-WW6whpgJcOO5pmkO9LX5_ErijrQ9GX0hjuIlDBxawWOybAX2ltYrvxh3NhVNcVMeftdUknizgsuQ8M8tIXH8YS3K_iaVsFj66KcYBE0NQby7jFAvgEHR3B8kSxfKqgj3MpZDxSxuQlDXwxDaFUJAqtfN6F-GmpAnllU7)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4f266d82fe804e61ab60e9ff2836483c&_e=VnJSYZvg1mLI2MNPmk_xrBA6wf0erzWE_yvDCwHwqIm0HKEdagXbmrVu661J-XlzjrnjqIRgcrkRjES1OC8-NIGtMqnD-7kJdiY4nmnM4fXbFM3jdsQW0CPyWNtNfu1mR0ak9073tnz-NR-w-oW9UVciKl-6zKhFVNlwrtEYTdLeZ1FddvoRm5IxNOY3D234PEkFV3aFDZKJySU8QGl-rW0SvGfApvwH84WVOEFZyJlXvlvc04qpJhlb0yRjr9t4WlrIcPUpaRw35P4Bl_jn0DhEEiQAEr0tXK9QDlRqsnSfMbQqT-E474OJSSqxETxkXTjoCWHLQmm1XSA3QocIuZNPci_R2cHc31Z_ZCLqf93Q3OIOqea4q5Ak4KpaYMWO)

Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking:** **[Will you give $5 or more right now – split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69122489/425143795/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4411-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTVhOGFjNi1kYzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kT2JHTOwgCGFflK8MoVT7-MIr74SbVLV1vdwaQHWM0c=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

name: Claudia Tenney [NY-24]
subject: Conceded this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia Tenney for Congress
body:
I had to congratulate my opponent

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1480fc250e5c4ce6888937368947948a&_e=nndro5iqnJtQQriCUQintnOO1C8K-IKK491HhEfN9gy0UAdFohulzjo6yTT1z8CcP8tJbtlF3NlB7DWQwoR2LFNGNhMcjgUQSYtxiqtiYp7rjWPgoO2IYO64YPGoBDMNFPBTxL6m35lUEHMz76JNG4LxdohbOcMzC7SmiA78MqTxUncHffLChuPitK2TDNI-6THry5WnDId6xSnZ5dG74hLQSEOYh-_IyojJrEjhKdzHV8VmZ3JpKF96dZFBGJlghYfGHstRo1ynArWYUuXrnY0giYrFm2ePTt7FE0kMgmAkgKN4wmuDGQ6B3V1GgKe3HZysex6vMZMYDTrymLGmwb5oSdFXbat2WWVf6nXABpypwIG5WAJQmMm6DtoYbnqh2b7MeKZhwTBpyPjedxdApUTRq1jBUGgMRGZ7z-86R8xxhqc6wcKqbR9A0UR0pWJJ)
---

Friend --

I couldn't believe it came down to this.

It was one of the more humbling experiences of my life.

**I 'm Claudia Tenney. I'm a single mom and America First conservative running to defeat Joe Biden & the radical left machine. **

**In 2018, the Democrats threw everything they had at me, and narrowly defeated me by a few thousand votes and I had to concede the election & congratulate my opponent. **

**I was heartbroken. **

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm a conservative who doesn't believe in giving up when the going gets tough._

In fact- I was more motivated than ever to run again- and I did.

It was election night in 2020, and the polls had already closed, but ballots kept coming in- and they kept on counting.

And as a fierce defender of election integrity, I wasn't about to let the Democrat machine pull a fast one on us. I took on Biden, the Democrats, and Hillary Clinton's personal attorney in court & was declared the winner two months later _**by just 109 votes.**_

I won't sugar coat this- the Democrats are still livid that a single mom from upstate New York was able to humiliate them after they spent millions to destroy me.

The House Majority & the fate of our nation hinges on this very race at this very moment.

**So here is how I'm asking you to help:** **[Will you contribute just $10 to my campaign in the next few minutes to defend this seat and deliver Joe Biden and the Democrats another humiliating upset?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1480fc250e5c4ce6888937368947948a&_e=nndro5iqnJtQQriCUQintnOO1C8K-IKK491HhEfN9gy0UAdFohulzjo6yTT1z8CcP8tJbtlF3NlB7DWQwoR2LFNGNhMcjgUQSYtxiqtiYp7rjWPgoO2IYO64YPGoBDMNFPBTxL6m35lUEHMz76JNG4LxdohbOcMzC7SmiA78MqTxUncHffLChuPitK2TDNI-6THry5WnDId6xSnZ5dG74hLQSEOYh-_IyojJrEjhKdzHV8VmZ3JpKF96dZFBGJlghYfGHstRo1ynArWYUuXrnWbxvZQsGgdf78lhwCh2nE90orEkvjH9ngcAIeJMpeoQNy9BPu1tN85vF92S-mE2uECsB3TtrKC5W2SS-G1sncrJngEXsiVIH6QDUBU0auGVT7wysNgTkoU8coITvKamjsprzCBM6lnAIQHJDpHGf_X59nXHBq0WAqZdaoBhlQhe "Will you contribute just $10 to my campaign in the next few minutes to defend this seat and deliver Joe Biden and the Democrats another humiliating upset? ")**

I'll just tell you: this is going to be the biggest Congressional race in America & grassroots support will decide who wins it.
---

Thank you so much!

**Claudia Tenney

### **IT’S UP TO YOU ALASKA**
---
#### **300 Petition Books Returned So Far... 600+ Still in Circulation**
**Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:****Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need help**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)
---
### **Message To Alaskans**
---
### **THANK YOU, OVER 300+ Petition Books Returned**
---
#### **The state is not going to give us a Special election, so we have until January 16th to submit our signatures. In many places we are over 150% of the required signatures, though we have ordered another 400 petition books and plan to distribute them in Sept / Oct.**
#### **Please continue to send your petition books in notarized. We will be in touch shortly to send out new books. We appreciate all of your time and effort. Today we had 74 petition books returned in a single day, very exciting and I hope all Alaskans appreciate the effort and time by all involved (Over 900 Alaskan Volunteers Across The State) to make this a reality. We plan to submit 200-300% of the required signatures.**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
What you missed this week. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-ajljlid-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* RIP **[Bob Barker.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-y/)**
* Biden wants money for a**[new vaccine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-j/).**
* Biden was **[booed](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* Those **[paper straws](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-i/)** are bad for you.
* Colorado is **[in decline](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-d/).**
* National Archive has over**[5400 emails](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-h/) **with Joe's alias.
* Gen Milley claims there will be **[accountability for Afghan withdrawal](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-b/).**
* Trump is spreading**[fake news](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-n/).**
* DeSantis warns people**[not to loot](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-p/) **after the hurricane.
* CO kids got **[kicked out of class](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-x/)** for his Gadsden patch!
* Moderators have been announced for the next debate. **[Will you watch?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-m/)**
* The IRS has**[lost millions of taxpayer records](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-c/).**
* Poll:**[Would you vote](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-q/) **for a strong 3rd party candidate?
* White House wins **[Gaslight Award of 2023.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-a/)**
* Biden plans to **[skip 9/11 Memorials](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-f/) **and hide in Alaska.

### **She's Not Wrong**
Nikki Haley called the U.S. Senate **[the most privileged nursing home in the country.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-z/)**
### **Vacation Joe**
**[KJP got testy with a reporter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-v/)** when he pointed out that response time for the Florida Hurricanes was much quicker than the Maui fires and suggested it was because of Biden's vacation schedule. **Unemployment Rate Jumps** A report on the labor market indicated the **[unemployment rate jumped to 3.8% from 3.5%](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-e/)** , a nearly three-year high. But don't worry, Biden says it's **[not as bad as it could be](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-s/).** [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajljlid-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Binkley=20for=20President?=
subject: It's time to conquer the deficit together!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Binkley For President 2024
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=1a8ae9f9fd&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | | Dear Friend

Just in the last month, I have spoken to thousands of people about my bold new plan to balance the budget and **bring back America's economy in a BIG way.**

I am ready to share this message with all Americans at the GOP debate later this month. I need your help to do it!

**Our initial goal is to raise $20,000 over Labor Day weekend **to boost our reach through media appearances, social media and direct mail.

Would you consider donating $25, $50 or $100 today?

We can reach this goal quickly if 200 generous supporters donate $100!

Any amount you give will help bring my message of unity and fiscal responsibility to every household in the nation.
---
| [Donate Today](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3b6e8d57fb&e=c1403f41d3 "Donate Today")
---
| _Tip: Make it a recurring donation to multiply your impact!_
I am the only candidate with a clear plan to confront the deficit and bring the budget back into balance in 7 years. Moreover, under my leadership, **transparency and accountability will be mandatory** for Congress, and especially for the Washington bureaucrats who spend taxpayer money with abandon.

In the last 7 years, our annual deficit skyrocketed from $620 billion to $1.375 trillion. DC is running our economy into the ground with its irresponsible overspending.

**We have to try something new. **

If you are tired of business as usual in Washington, support my campaign for President. Together, we can start paying back the nation's debts, fix the budget, and get our deficit under control.

This will **restore hope for everyday Americans** and for our next generation.

---
| [Donate Today](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=ef86764a68&e=c1403f41d3 "Donate Today")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
\+ following up from last month

| Peter — Thank you.

I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it.

Looking ahead, we have a busy work period in Washington as we work on a spending deal with a Republican majority that is intent on shutting down our government.

But I and my fellow Democrats will be fighting tooth and nail for a fair deal so we can keep the lights on without sacrificing working families’ priorities.

But Peter, we have a lot of work to do and a major End of Quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month.

If we want to take on McCarthy and the rest of the MAGA party, we need to hit our fundraising goals. And because we missed last month’s deadline, we have our work cut out for us.

[**So Peter, if you’re able and you haven’t already or want to chip in again, can I count on you to chip in $10 to jump into September with a running start? name: Urgent Message (via DLCC.org)
subject: Can you help us fight extremism in your state? »
body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m06iLNAd-MSsCN8QIrrkMfKGGPR8fnAfPt-6UGgd62We-wXvSVbCgtdmYVVswYuj4cxfoFG6jNInjoqG0fkc41VBC76KtWzX8GxXdEyDhUUpf_ooTKI8EgDGO_TXm2prqSZkLVP10CQL_mgXkg0Y2Pu22syL2KzbFZkG3C1JtPTg_lU03EHI_Rag-t_T2iCaFaYreep6Hwd8HqV75MKLMTl5aeNzWa8nCO4biyKcP_vlf84IsOIjf8wjhO2pISGjt2rFijDrQRK_gJbc-efJd3xLj_5giVSzxuYSguFXzIWdRqJEf5gs89FKUisnP3JhMM5ClplSBWWa1hPJa3bNI1-XiDN91DJC4JCocX7p5ug6q6GddwkvHc0ayETV9jefXUZLAIREKs76EP9oWMJ7q4uWUpCUOwHcFS6DMrdCz4CiNodEi8xg6dSxOoZIWDCF9H9cVzTNdU6viEJCntW7GN9Mwuha8v140GBNb4EyMPURUn3Y99no8qW2FHlzvAeFD_pwtruG1rZYJgqBwAmve5yGPJjkuI0KYHuzobpiprPWiD-FoeTbYkf3NWl2e-MjKx72yQlMEXJmvRiAbOnNaLmuRQuLspCn70uAq7dAIGg58J6XymZW6MeX7Jh-OQ62-Ox07Xy2h579gqqGElZa2NLIoD09CyXm8lGohgI3846k/3z9/TDpxLbJdRe6bkqjmTOVE9g/h0/GBvRDj4s3a8pAwLbwuxeOZLdhd_VA79RDcQVwjJZjIE) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: our August fundraising goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m so humbled and grateful for the trust and support you’ve put into this movement, Peter
#
Peter,
August was a busy month. Between bringing Harvey home from the NICU and hitting the road for events all across Missouri, I honestly wasn’t sure if we’d be able to keep our fundraising on track. **But thanks to your help, we didn’t just meet our end-of-month fundraising goal — we absolutely crushed it.**
When I made the decision to run this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But since the day I got into this race, everyday people like you have showed up to help me prove that it’s possible to build a truly grassroots movement here in Missouri — one that can defeat Josh Hawley, flip this Senate seat, and take back power for working people.
**I’m just so humbled and grateful for the trust and support you’ve put into this campaign, Peter, and we still have so much work ahead of us.**
Poll after poll has shown that Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable Republican up for re-election in 2024. So now, GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors have made me one of their top targets — raising millions of dollars to spend on desperate, false attack ads about me and our campaign.
They know we have a real chance to make their worst fears a reality next year. And the surest way we can take advantage of this opportunity is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum. So if you’re still able to support our movement:
**[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? Our next major FEC fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of the month, so it’s critical that we start September off strong.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36029?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36030?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36029?refcode=em20230902-3679&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya)
---
Thank you so much,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230902-3679-footer&t=9&refcode2=3679_614464_x2-jya&akid=3679%2E614464%2Ex2-jya)**
